examples.sentence: If you pull an all-nighter tonight, you might regret it tomorrow when you’re exhausted.
examples.translation: Si trasnochas esta noche, podrías arrepentirte mañana cuando estés agotado.

examples.sentence: The magician pulled a rabbit out of a hat, astonishing the audience with his skill.
examples.translation: El mago sacó un conejo de un sombrero, asombrando al público con su habilidad.

examples.sentence: During the show, she pulled a rabbit out of a hat to surprise the children watching.
examples.translation: Durante el espectáculo, ella sacó un conejo de un sombrero para sorprender a los niños que miraban.

examples.sentence: He pulled a rabbit out of a hat by producing a white bunny seemingly from nowhere.
examples.translation: Hizo un truco sacando un conejo blanco aparentemente de la nada.

examples.sentence: If you pull a rabbit out of a hat at the party, everyone will be impressed by your magic.
examples.translation: Si haces un truco sacando un conejo de un sombrero en la fiesta, todos quedarán impresionados con tu magia.

examples.sentence: When the negotiations stalled, the CEO pulled a rabbit out of a hat with a last-minute proposal.
examples.translation: Cuando las negociaciones se estancaron, el CEO sacó un as bajo la manga con una propuesta de último minuto.

examples.sentence: They pulled a rabbit out of a hat by securing funding just before the project was canceled.
examples.translation: Sacaron un as bajo la manga obteniendo financiamiento justo antes de que cancelaran el proyecto.

examples.sentence: If she can pull a rabbit out of a hat during the presentation, it might save the deal.
examples.translation: Si ella puede sorprender con una solución inesperada durante la presentación, podría salvar el acuerdo.

examples.sentence: The child pulled away from her mother's hand to chase after the puppy.
examples.translation: La niña se apartó de la mano de su madre para correr tras el cachorro.

examples.sentence: He pulled away slowly, not wanting to startle the sleeping dog.
examples.translation: Se alejó lentamente, sin querer asustar al perro dormido.

examples.sentence: After the accident, the car pulled away from the scene before the police arrived.
examples.translation: Después del accidente, el coche se alejó de la escena antes de que llegara la policía.

examples.sentence: Please pull away from the curb carefully to avoid hitting the parked vehicles.
examples.translation: Por favor, sal de la acera con cuidado para no chocar con los vehículos estacionados.

examples.sentence: The train pulled away from the station exactly on schedule at 9 a.m.
examples.translation: El tren salió de la estación puntualmente a las 9 a.m.

examples.sentence: Once the signal turned green, the bus pulled away smoothly from the stop.
examples.translation: Cuando la luz cambió a verde, el autobús arrancó suavemente de la parada.

examples.sentence: She pulled away from the dock in the small boat, ready for her fishing trip.
examples.translation: Ella se alejó del muelle en el pequeño bote, lista para su jornada de pesca.

examples.sentence: The taxi pulled away quickly as the passenger closed the door behind them.
examples.translation: El taxi arrancó rápidamente mientras el pasajero cerraba la puerta detrás.

examples.sentence: During the marathon, the leading runner pulled away from the pack in the final miles.
examples.translation: Durante el maratón, el corredor líder se alejó del grupo en los últimos kilómetros.

examples.sentence: Our team managed to pull away in the last quarter, securing a comfortable win.
examples.translation: Nuestro equipo logró despegar en el último cuarto, asegurando una victoria cómoda.

examples.sentence: If you want to win, you need to pull away early and maintain your lead throughout the race.
examples.translation: Si quieres ganar, debes despegar temprano y mantener la ventaja durante toda la carrera.

examples.sentence: After the argument, he started to pull away emotionally, avoiding contact with his friends.
examples.translation: Después de la discusión, comenzó a distanciarse emocionalmente, evitando el contacto con sus amigos.

examples.sentence: She has pulled away from her family since moving to a new city and making new friends.
examples.translation: Ella se ha distanciado de su familia desde que se mudó a una nueva ciudad y hizo nuevos amigos.

examples.sentence: If he keeps pulling away like this, their relationship might not survive much longer.
examples.translation: Si sigue distanciándose así, su relación podría no sobrevivir mucho tiempo.

examples.sentence: The children pulled faces at each other to make everyone in the room laugh.
examples.translation: Los niños hacían muecas para hacer reír a todos en la sala.

examples.sentence: During the photo shoot, the model pulled several funny faces to lighten the mood.
examples.translation: Durante la sesión de fotos, la modelo hizo varias caras graciosas para animar el ambiente.

examples.sentence: At the party, he pulled faces behind the speaker’s back, amusing his friends.
examples.translation: En la fiesta, hacía muecas a espaldas del orador, divirtiendo a sus amigos.

examples.sentence: Whenever she’s bored, she pulls faces at her reflection in the mirror.
examples.translation: Cuando está aburrida, hace muecas frente al espejo.

examples.sentence: He pulled a face when tasting the sour lemon, unable to hide his reaction.
examples.translation: Hizo una mueca al probar el limón ácido, incapaz de ocultar su reacción.

examples.sentence: While concentrating hard on the puzzle, she pulled faces of frustration repeatedly.
examples.translation: Mientras se concentraba en el rompecabezas, hacía muecas de frustración repetidamente.

examples.sentence: The patient pulled a face in pain when the doctor pressed on the injured area.
examples.translation: El paciente hizo una mueca de dolor cuando el médico presionó la zona lesionada.

examples.sentence: After reaching the top of the company, he pulled the ladder up after himself, refusing to help newcomers.
examples.translation: Después de llegar a la cima de la empresa, quitó la escalera tras de sí, negándose a ayudar a los nuevos.

examples.sentence: Some alumni pull the ladder up after themselves by not supporting scholarships for future students.
examples.translation: Algunos exalumnos actúan egoístamente al no apoyar becas para futuros estudiantes.

examples.sentence: She achieved success but pulled the ladder up behind herself, blocking others from similar opportunities.
examples.translation: Ella logró el éxito pero se comportó egoístamente, bloqueando a otros para que no tuvieran las mismas oportunidades.

examples.sentence: After securing the promotion, John pulled the ladder up behind himself by cutting off mentorship programs.
examples.translation: Después de conseguir el ascenso, John eliminó los programas de mentoría, impidiendo que otros siguieran su camino.

examples.sentence: Many criticize wealthy individuals who pull the ladder up behind themselves, making success harder for others.
examples.translation: Muchos critican a los ricos que se comportan egoístamente, dificultando el éxito de los demás.

examples.sentence: The company pulled the ladder up behind itself by ending internships that once helped entry-level workers.
examples.translation: La empresa eliminó las pasantías que antes ayudaban a los trabajadores principiantes.

examples.sentence: She pulled the ladder up behind herself by refusing to share her contacts with aspiring entrepreneurs.
examples.translation: Ella actuó egoístamente negándose a compartir sus contactos con emprendedores aspirantes.

examples.sentence: Politicians often pull the ladder up behind themselves, limiting access to resources once available to all.
examples.translation: Los políticos a menudo se comportan egoístamente, limitando el acceso a recursos que antes estaban disponibles para todos.

examples.sentence: The CEO pulled the ladder up behind him by ending training programs that helped staff advance.
examples.translation: El CEO eliminó los programas de capacitación que ayudaban al personal a avanzar.

examples.sentence: When he claimed he could finish the project alone in one day, I thought he was really pulling the long bow.
examples.translation: Cuando dijo que podía terminar el proyecto solo en un día, pensé que estaba exagerando mucho.

examples.sentence: She tends to pull the long bow when telling stories about her achievements to impress others.
examples.translation: Ella tiende a exagerar mucho al contar historias sobre sus logros para impresionar a otros.

examples.sentence: Are you pulling the long bow with that excuse, or did something really happen to delay the delivery?
examples.translation: ¿Estás exagerando con esa excusa, o realmente pasó algo que retrasó la entrega?

examples.sentence: Please put down your name and contact details on the registration form before entering.
examples.translation: Por favor, escriba su nombre y datos de contacto en el formulario de inscripción antes de entrar.

examples.sentence: I put down the dates of all our meetings in my calendar so I wouldn’t forget.
examples.translation: Anoté las fechas de todas nuestras reuniones en mi calendario para no olvidarlas.

examples.sentence: They asked me to put down the items we wanted to order on the list provided by the supplier.
examples.translation: Me pidieron que anotara los artículos que queríamos pedir en la lista que proporcionó el proveedor.

examples.sentence: During the meeting, he was put down repeatedly by his colleagues, which made him feel undervalued.
examples.translation: Durante la reunión, sus colegas lo menospreciaron repetidamente, lo que le hizo sentirse poco valorado.

examples.sentence: You shouldn't put people down just because they have different opinions than yours.
examples.translation: No deberías menospreciar a las personas solo porque tengan opiniones diferentes a las tuyas.

examples.sentence: She felt put down when her ideas were dismissed without consideration by the team leader.
examples.translation: Se sintió menospreciada cuando su líder de equipo desestimó sus ideas sin considerarlas.

examples.sentence: After months of suffering, the vet recommended we put down Max to end his pain.
examples.translation: Después de meses de sufrimiento, el veterinario recomendó que sacrifiquemos a Max para acabar con su dolor.

examples.sentence: They had to put down the injured horse when it became clear recovery was impossible.
examples.translation: Tuvieron que sacrificar al caballo herido cuando quedó claro que la recuperación era imposible.

examples.sentence: If the stray dog appears aggressive and dangerous, the shelter may put it down humanely.
examples.translation: Si el perro callejero parece agresivo y peligroso, el refugio podría sacrificarlo humanamente.

examples.sentence: The government quickly put down the uprising before it could spread to other cities.
examples.translation: El gobierno reprimió rápidamente el levantamiento antes de que pudiera extenderse a otras ciudades.

examples.sentence: Troops were deployed to put down the riot that broke out downtown last night.
examples.translation: Se desplegaron tropas para reprimir el motín que estalló anoche en el centro.

examples.sentence: They put down the rebellion with overwhelming force, restoring order within days.
examples.translation: Reprimieron la rebelión con fuerza abrumadora, restaurando el orden en pocos días.

examples.sentence: We put down a deposit on the apartment to secure it before the lease signing.
examples.translation: Hicimos un depósito para asegurar el apartamento antes de firmar el contrato.

examples.sentence: Did you put down any money when you ordered the custom furniture?
examples.translation: ¿Pusiste algo de dinero cuando pediste los muebles a medida?

examples.sentence: They will need to put down at least 20% of the purchase price as a down payment.
examples.translation: Tendrán que pagar al menos el 20% del precio de compra como anticipo.

examples.sentence: On her turn, Lisa put down a queen of hearts to beat Mark's pair of jacks.
examples.translation: En su turno, Lisa jugó una reina de corazones para superar el par de jotas de Mark.

examples.sentence: He hesitated before putting down his final card, hoping it would win the game.
examples.translation: Dudó antes de jugar su última carta, esperando que ganara el juego.

examples.sentence: The dealer asked all players to put down their cards face up on the table.
examples.translation: El repartidor pidió a todos los jugadores que pusieran sus cartas boca arriba sobre la mesa.

examples.sentence: We put down our cards quickly when the timer started, trying not to lose any points.
examples.translation: Pusimos nuestras cartas rápidamente cuando empezó el temporizador, tratando de no perder puntos.

examples.sentence: After traveling the world for years, they finally put down roots in a quiet coastal town.
examples.translation: Después de viajar por el mundo durante años, finalmente echaron raíces en un tranquilo pueblo costero.

examples.sentence: When Sarah put down in the city, she started building a community of close friends.
examples.translation: Cuando Sarah se estableció en la ciudad, comenzó a construir una comunidad de amigos cercanos.

examples.sentence: The family plans to put down roots here after the children finish school next year.
examples.translation: La familia planea establecerse aquí después de que los niños terminen la escuela el próximo año.

examples.sentence: Make sure to put down your current address on the registration form.
examples.translation: Asegúrate de anotar tu dirección actual en el formulario de inscripción.

examples.sentence: They put me down as a volunteer for the community cleanup event next weekend.
examples.translation: Me inscribieron como voluntario para el evento de limpieza comunitaria el próximo fin de semana.

examples.sentence: The hospital put the patient down as allergic to penicillin in their records.
examples.translation: El hospital registró al paciente como alérgico a la penicilina en sus archivos.

examples.sentence: Please put me down as attending the conference on Friday morning.
examples.translation: Por favor, apúntame como asistente a la conferencia del viernes por la mañana.

examples.sentence: The teacher put him down as absent since he didn't show up for class today.
examples.translation: El profesor lo anotó como ausente porque no asistió a clase hoy.

examples.sentence: If you put down the wrong title, the form will be rejected by the office.
examples.translation: Si anotas el título incorrecto, la oficina rechazará el formulario.

examples.sentence: I put my headache down to the stress I've been under this week.
examples.translation: Atribuí mi dolor de cabeza al estrés que he tenido esta semana.

examples.sentence: They put the team's poor performance down to lack of practice before the tournament.
examples.translation: Atribuyeron el mal desempeño del equipo a la falta de práctica antes del torneo.

examples.sentence: Would you put her sudden change in mood down to the medication she's taking?
examples.translation: ¿Atribuirías su cambio de humor repentino a la medicación que está tomando?

examples.sentence: When you put that in perspective, the small delay isn't such a big deal.
examples.translation: Si lo pones en perspectiva, el pequeño retraso no es un gran problema.

examples.sentence: She put her failures into perspective by remembering all her previous successes.
examples.translation: Ella puso sus fracasos en perspectiva recordando todos sus éxitos anteriores.

examples.sentence: Put this argument into perspective before you get too upset about it.
examples.translation: Pon este argumento en perspectiva antes de enojarte demasiado por ello.

examples.sentence: I told him we won the contract—put that in your pipe and smoke it.
examples.translation: Le dije que ganamos el contrato; tómalo en cuenta y acéptalo.

examples.sentence: If you think you can beat me, put that in your pipe and smoke it.
examples.translation: Si crees que puedes vencerme, tómalo en cuenta y acéptalo.

examples.sentence: She just got promoted to manager—put that in your pipe and smoke it, John.
examples.translation: Ella acaba de ser ascendida a gerente; tómalo en cuenta y acéptalo, John.

examples.sentence: Bringing up the budget cuts at the meeting really put the cat among the pigeons.
examples.translation: Mencionar los recortes presupuestarios en la reunión realmente provocó un gran revuelo.

examples.sentence: When she questioned the CEO's decision, she put the cat among the pigeons in the boardroom.
examples.translation: Cuando cuestionó la decisión del CEO, provocó controversia en la junta directiva.

examples.sentence: His controversial comments about the project put the cat among the pigeons among the team members.
examples.translation: Sus comentarios controvertidos sobre el proyecto generaron conflicto entre los miembros del equipo.

examples.sentence: The sudden rain queer someone's pitch by delaying all the outdoor events.
examples.translation: La lluvia repentina arruinó los planes de alguien al retrasar todos los eventos al aire libre.

examples.sentence: I didn't expect her to arrive early and queer my pitch with my surprise plan.
examples.translation: No esperaba que ella llegara temprano y arruinara mi plan sorpresa.

examples.sentence: The last-minute rule change really queered his pitch and cost him the win.
examples.translation: El cambio de reglas de última hora realmente arruinó su oportunidad y le costó la victoria.

examples.sentence: He caught the ball quick as a flash and scored the winning touchdown.
examples.translation: Atrapó la pelota rápido como un rayo y anotó el touchdown ganador.

examples.sentence: You have to be quick as a flash to grab the limited-time deals online.
examples.translation: Tienes que ser rápido como un rayo para aprovechar las ofertas por tiempo limitado en línea.

examples.sentence: She reacted quick as a flash to the emergency, saving the child from harm.
examples.translation: Ella reaccionó rápido como un rayo ante la emergencia, salvando al niño del peligro.

examples.sentence: Lightning flashed quick as lightning across the darkening sky during the storm.
examples.translation: El relámpago iluminó el cielo oscuro rápido como un rayo durante la tormenta.

examples.sentence: The runner was quick as lightning, finishing the race in record time.
examples.translation: El corredor fue rápido como un rayo, terminando la carrera en tiempo récord.

examples.sentence: She responded to the question quick as lightning, surprising everyone with her knowledge.
examples.translation: Ella respondió a la pregunta rápido como un rayo, sorprendiendo a todos con su conocimiento.

examples.sentence: The cat darted quick as lightning when it heard the doorbell ring.
examples.translation: El gato salió disparado rápido como un rayo cuando escuchó el timbre.

examples.sentence: He made a quick buck selling old electronics on the internet last weekend.
examples.translation: Él ganó dinero rápido vendiendo aparatos electrónicos usados por internet el fin de semana pasado.

examples.sentence: Don’t expect to make a quick buck in this business; it takes time and effort.
examples.translation: No esperes ganar dinero rápido en este negocio; toma tiempo y esfuerzo.

examples.sentence: They tried to make a quick buck by flipping houses, but the market crashed.
examples.translation: Intentaron hacer dinero rápido comprando y vendiendo casas, pero el mercado se desplomó.

examples.sentence: After the car accident, the patient showed raccoon eyes indicating possible skull fracture.
examples.translation: Después del accidente de coche, el paciente presentó ojos de mapache que indican posible fractura de cráneo.

examples.sentence: The doctor noted raccoon eyes as a warning sign during the trauma examination.
examples.translation: El médico observó ojos de mapache como señal de advertencia durante el examen de trauma.

examples.sentence: Raccoon eyes appeared on the injured athlete, prompting immediate hospital transfer.
examples.translation: Aparecieron ojos de mapache en el atleta herido, lo que provocó su traslado inmediato al hospital.

examples.sentence: Her raccoon eyes from smudged makeup made her look tired and disheveled at the party.
examples.translation: Sus ojos de mapache por el maquillaje corrido la hicieron parecer cansada y despeinada en la fiesta.

examples.sentence: Don’t rub your eyes too much or you’ll get raccoon eyes from the mascara spreading.
examples.translation: No te frotes mucho los ojos o tendrás ojos de mapache por el rímel que se corre.

examples.sentence: She spent an hour fixing her raccoon eyes before the photoshoot to look perfect.
examples.translation: Pasó una hora arreglando sus ojos de mapache antes de la sesión de fotos para verse perfecta.

examples.sentence: After winning the award, he didn’t rest on his laurels but started preparing for the next challenge.
examples.translation: Después de ganar el premio, no se conformó con sus logros y empezó a prepararse para el siguiente reto.

examples.sentence: You can’t afford to rest on your laurels in this industry or you’ll quickly fall behind.
examples.translation: No puedes darte el lujo de conformarte con tus logros en esta industria o pronto quedarás atrás.

examples.sentence: She was warned not to rest on her laurels after a successful debut season.
examples.translation: Le advirtieron que no se conformara con sus logros tras una temporada debut exitosa.

examples.sentence: The company experienced increasing returns to scale when it doubled its workforce.
examples.translation: La empresa experimentó rendimientos crecientes a escala cuando duplicó su plantilla.

examples.sentence: Economists study returns to scale to understand how output changes with input adjustments.
examples.translation: Los economistas estudian los rendimientos a escala para entender cómo cambia la producción con ajustes en los insumos.

examples.sentence: If output grows less than the input increase, it's called decreasing returns to scale.
examples.translation: Si la producción crece menos que el aumento de insumos, se denomina rendimientos decrecientes a escala.

examples.sentence: Her explanation about the missing files just rings false given the evidence we have.
examples.translation: Su explicación sobre los archivos perdidos suena falsa dada la evidencia que tenemos.

examples.sentence: The politician’s promises ring false to many voters who have seen no improvements.
examples.translation: Las promesas del político suenan falsas para muchos votantes que no han visto mejoras.

examples.sentence: That excuse rings false when you consider the timeline of events.
examples.translation: Esa excusa suena falsa si consideras la cronología de los eventos.

examples.sentence: His apology rings hollow after he repeated the same mistake twice.
examples.translation: Su disculpa suena vacía después de haber cometido el mismo error dos veces.

examples.sentence: Compliments from a boss who rarely praises anyone often ring hollow.
examples.translation: Los cumplidos de un jefe que rara vez elogia a alguien a menudo suenan vacíos.

examples.sentence: The charity’s promises to help ring hollow without any real action behind them.
examples.translation: Las promesas de la organización benéfica para ayudar suenan vacías sin acciones reales detrás.

examples.sentence: Since the product launched, the customer service line has been ringing off the hook all day.
examples.translation: Desde el lanzamiento del producto, la línea de servicio al cliente ha estado sonando sin parar todo el día.

examples.sentence: I can’t answer the phone right now; it’s been ringing off the hook since this morning.
examples.translation: No puedo contestar el teléfono ahora; ha estado sonando sin parar desde esta mañana.

examples.sentence: The help desk was ringing off the hook after the software update caused errors.
examples.translation: El centro de ayuda no paraba de sonar después de que la actualización del software causara errores.

examples.sentence: The shocking news really rang his bell and made him reconsider his plans.
examples.translation: La noticia impactante realmente lo despertó y lo hizo reconsiderar sus planes.

examples.sentence: That comment about the budget cuts rang her bell and sparked a heated debate.
examples.translation: Ese comentario sobre los recortes presupuestarios la alertó y provocó un debate acalorado.

examples.sentence: The sudden change in policy rang my bell and made me pay closer attention to the details.
examples.translation: El cambio repentino en la política me alertó y me hizo prestar más atención a los detalles.

examples.sentence: The boxer rang his opponent’s bell with a powerful right hook in the third round.
examples.translation: El boxeador aturdió a su oponente con un poderoso gancho de derecha en el tercer asalto.

examples.sentence: He was rung bell hard during the match and had to sit out the next round.
examples.translation: Le dieron un golpe fuerte en la cabeza durante el combate y tuvo que descansar en el siguiente asalto.

examples.sentence: Did you see how he rang his bell with that uppercut? It was impressive!
examples.translation: ¿Viste cómo le dio un golpe en la cabeza con ese uppercut? ¡Fue impresionante!

examples.sentence: The fighter was rung bell by a sudden blow to the temple and stumbled backward.
examples.translation: El luchador fue aturdido por un golpe repentino en la sien y retrocedió tambaleándose.

examples.sentence: That new jazz album really rings my bell; I’ve been listening to it nonstop.
examples.translation: Ese nuevo álbum de jazz realmente me encanta; lo he estado escuchando sin parar.

examples.sentence: Does this type of music ring your bell, or would you prefer something else?
examples.translation: ¿Este tipo de música te gusta o prefieres otra cosa?

examples.sentence: She said his charm really rang her bell, and they started dating soon after.
examples.translation: Ella dijo que su encanto realmente la conquistó y empezaron a salir poco después.

examples.sentence: He rang his rival’s bell with a knockout punch in the final seconds of the fight.
examples.translation: Aturdió a su rival con un golpe de nocaut en los últimos segundos de la pelea.

examples.sentence: Being rung bell in a competition can be discouraging, but it’s part of the sport.
examples.translation: Ser noqueado en una competición puede ser desalentador, pero es parte del deporte.

examples.sentence: The champion rang his opponent’s bell early, securing a quick victory.
examples.translation: El campeón aturdió a su oponente temprano, asegurando una victoria rápida.

examples.sentence: The cashier rang up the groceries and told us the total was $45.60.
examples.translation: El cajero registró las compras y nos dijo que el total era $45.60.

examples.sentence: When you ring up a large bill, make sure to check for any errors before paying.
examples.translation: Cuando te registren una factura grande, asegúrate de revisar si hay errores antes de pagar.

examples.sentence: The restaurant rang up the dinner bill quickly so they could close on time.
examples.translation: El restaurante registró la cuenta de la cena rápidamente para poder cerrar a tiempo.

examples.sentence: The theater crew rang up the curtain just as the audience settled into their seats.
examples.translation: El equipo del teatro levantó el telón justo cuando el público se acomodaba en sus asientos.

examples.sentence: As the lights dimmed, the stage manager rang up the curtain to start the play.
examples.translation: Mientras las luces se apagaban, el encargado del escenario levantó el telón para comenzar la obra.

examples.sentence: They had to ring up the curtain twice due to a technical glitch during the opening scene.
examples.translation: Tuvieron que levantar el telón dos veces debido a un fallo técnico durante la escena de apertura.

examples.sentence: Before the actors appeared, someone rang up the curtain to reveal the set design.
examples.translation: Antes de que aparecieran los actores, alguien levantó el telón para mostrar el diseño del escenario.

examples.sentence: The mayor officially rang up the curtain on the city’s new art festival last night.
examples.translation: El alcalde inauguró oficialmente el nuevo festival de arte de la ciudad anoche.

examples.sentence: They plan to ring up the curtain on the charity event with a grand opening ceremony.
examples.translation: Planean inaugurar el evento benéfico con una gran ceremonia de apertura.

examples.sentence: The company rang up the curtain on its latest product line during the press conference.
examples.translation: La empresa inauguró su última línea de productos durante la conferencia de prensa.

examples.sentence: The director rang up the curtain to commence the first act of the drama.
examples.translation: El director levantó el telón para comenzar el primer acto del drama.

examples.sentence: They rang up the curtain promptly at 7 pm to start the evening’s performance.
examples.translation: Levantaron el telón puntualmente a las 7 pm para iniciar la función de la noche.

examples.sentence: Due to technical difficulties, the curtain was rung up late, delaying the show.
examples.translation: Debido a dificultades técnicas, el telón se levantó tarde, retrasando el espectáculo.

examples.sentence: Grandpa Joe lived to the ripe old age of 98, still tending his garden every morning.
examples.translation: Grandpa Joe lived to the ripe old age of 98, still tending his garden every morning.

examples.sentence: She hopes to see her children grow up and enjoy life to a ripe old age.
examples.translation: She hopes to see her children grow up and enjoy life to a ripe old age.

examples.sentence: My great-aunt passed away peacefully at a ripe old age, surrounded by family.
examples.translation: My great-aunt passed away peacefully at a ripe old age, surrounded by family.

examples.sentence: After hearing the news about the broken contract, Tom was rip-snorting mad and slammed the door.
examples.translation: After hearing the news about the broken contract, Tom was rip-snorting mad and slammed the door.

examples.sentence: You’d better stay quiet when she’s rip-snorting mad; she can really yell then.
examples.translation: You’d better stay quiet when she’s rip-snorting mad; she can really yell then.

examples.sentence: The boss got rip-snorting mad when the project deadline was missed again.
examples.translation: The boss got rip-snorting mad when the project deadline was missed again.

examples.sentence: "Rise and shine, everyone! The drill starts in five minutes," the sergeant shouted to his troops.
examples.translation: "Rise and shine, everyone! The drill starts in five minutes," the sergeant shouted to his troops.

examples.sentence: The camp counselor called out, "Rise and shine! Time to get moving for the hike."
examples.translation: The camp counselor called out, "Rise and shine! Time to get moving for the hike."

examples.sentence: When the coach yelled 'Rise and shine!' the players jumped out of bed ready to train.
examples.translation: When the coach yelled 'Rise and shine!' the players jumped out of bed ready to train.

examples.sentence: "Rise and shine, sleepyhead! Today’s going to be a great day," Mom said cheerfully.
examples.translation: "Rise and shine, sleepyhead! Today’s going to be a great day," Mom said cheerfully.

examples.sentence: Every morning, my alarm rings and I tell myself to rise and shine even if I don’t feel like it.
examples.translation: Every morning, my alarm rings and I tell myself to rise and shine even if I don’t feel like it.

examples.sentence: If you want to be productive, you have to rise and shine with a positive attitude.
examples.translation: If you want to be productive, you have to rise and shine with a positive attitude.

examples.sentence: Finding an honest politician is rocking-horse shit these days.
examples.translation: Finding an honest politician is extremely unlikely these days.

examples.sentence: Opportunities like that come along about as often as rocking-horse shit.
examples.translation: Opportunities like that come along extremely rarely.

examples.sentence: She said she'd call me back, but that’s about as likely as rocking-horse shit.
examples.translation: She said she'd call me back, but that’s about as likely as something that almost never happens.

examples.sentence: Believing he’ll finish the project on time is rocking-horse shit given his track record.
examples.translation: Believing he’ll finish the project on time is extremely unlikely given his track record.

examples.sentence: The stock market’s been roller-coasterish all week, with prices soaring one day and plunging the next.
examples.translation: The stock market’s been very volatile all week, with prices rapidly rising and falling.

examples.sentence: Her emotions were roller-coasterish after hearing the mixed news about her job application.
examples.translation: Her emotions were very changeable and intense after hearing the mixed news about her job application.

examples.sentence: That roller-coasterish ride through the theme park left us all breathless and laughing.
examples.translation: That ride through the theme park was full of ups and downs and very exciting.

examples.sentence: The comedian’s hilarious jokes had the audience rolling in the aisles by the end of the show.
examples.translation: The comedian’s hilarious jokes caused the audience to laugh loudly and continuously by the end of the show.

examples.sentence: When Sarah told that story about her cat, everyone was rolling in the aisles with laughter.
examples.translation: When Sarah told that story about her cat, everyone laughed loudly and non-stop.

examples.sentence: He’s so funny that his stand-up specials always make the crowd roll in the aisles.
examples.translation: He’s so funny that his stand-up specials always cause the crowd to laugh very loudly and continuously.

examples.sentence: Queen Elizabeth ruled in England with dignity and strength for many decades.
examples.translation: Queen Elizabeth governed England with dignity and strength for many decades.

examples.sentence: The emperor was ruled in by his advisors during the early years of his reign.
examples.translation: The emperor was governed or controlled by his advisors during the early years of his reign.

examples.sentence: For centuries, the dynasty ruled in that region, shaping its culture and laws.
examples.translation: For centuries, the dynasty governed that region, shaping its culture and laws.

examples.sentence: The newly appointed regent will rule in until the young prince comes of age.
examples.translation: The newly appointed regent will govern on behalf of the young prince until he comes of age.

examples.sentence: The rule in our office is that everyone must log their hours daily.
examples.translation: The standing regulation in our office is that everyone must log their hours daily.

examples.sentence: It’s a common rule in this organization to wear business casual on Fridays.
examples.translation: It’s a usual regulation in this organization to wear business casual on Fridays.

examples.sentence: The rule in the club prohibits smoking inside the building.
examples.translation: The rule in the club forbids smoking inside the building.

examples.sentence: One important rule in the team is that no player can join without a trial period.
examples.translation: One important rule in the team is that no player can join without a trial period.

examples.sentence: While the king was away, his brother ruled in as regent for several months.
examples.translation: While the king was away, his brother acted as the ruling authority for several months.

examples.sentence: The prince ruled in until the queen returned from her travels.
examples.translation: The prince governed temporarily until the queen returned from her travels.

examples.sentence: During the monarch’s illness, the council ruled in to maintain order.
examples.translation: During the monarch’s illness, the council acted as the ruling authority to maintain order.

examples.sentence: Who will rule in if the president is incapacitated for an extended period?
examples.translation: Who will act as the ruling authority if the president is incapacitated for an extended period?

examples.sentence: The judge ruled OK the defendant’s request to present new evidence.
examples.translation: The judge approved the defendant’s request to present new evidence.

examples.sentence: Our compliance team ruled OK the new safety procedures after thorough review.
examples.translation: Our compliance team approved the new safety procedures after thorough review.

examples.sentence: The inspector ruled OK the factory’s equipment as safe to operate.
examples.translation: The inspector declared the factory’s equipment safe to operate.

examples.sentence: After testing, the product was ruled OK for commercial release.
examples.translation: After testing, the product was approved for commercial release.

examples.sentence: The manager ruled OK the budget increase for the upcoming project.
examples.translation: The manager approved the budget increase for the upcoming project.

examples.sentence: Can you rule OK my proposal so we can move forward with the plan?
examples.translation: Can you approve my proposal so we can move forward with the plan?

examples.sentence: The committee ruled OK the use of the new software in classrooms.
examples.translation: The committee authorized the use of the new software in classrooms.

examples.sentence: The doctor ruled out heart disease after running several tests.
examples.translation: The doctor eliminated heart disease as a possibility after running several tests.

examples.sentence: We had to rule out several candidates before finding the right fit for the job.
examples.translation: We excluded several candidates before finding the right fit for the job.

examples.sentence: The investigation ruled out foul play in the accident.
examples.translation: The investigation excluded foul play as a cause of the accident.

examples.sentence: They ruled out the old warehouse as the source of the strange smell.
examples.translation: They eliminated the old warehouse as the source of the strange smell.

examples.sentence: The committee ruled out the proposal because it didn’t meet the funding criteria.
examples.translation: The committee determined the proposal was not allowed because it didn’t meet the funding criteria.

examples.sentence: You can’t rule out the possibility of rain during the outdoor event.
examples.translation: You cannot exclude the possibility of rain during the outdoor event.

examples.sentence: The council ruled out any changes to the zoning laws this year.
examples.translation: The council decided that changes to the zoning laws are not allowed this year.

examples.sentence: The mechanic ruled out an engine failure as the cause of the noise.
examples.translation: The mechanic discounted engine failure as the cause of the noise.

examples.sentence: Investigators ruled out arson after finding no signs of accelerants.
examples.translation: Investigators discounted arson as a possible cause after finding no signs of accelerants.

examples.sentence: We can’t rule out a technical glitch for the system crash just yet.
examples.translation: We cannot discount a technical glitch as a possible cause for the system crash yet.

examples.sentence: The sun rules the day, casting its warm light over the entire valley.
examples.translation: The sun governs the day, casting its warm light over the entire valley.

examples.sentence: In the poem, the moon yields at dawn when the sun rules the day.
examples.translation: In the poem, the moon yields at dawn when the sun governs the day.

examples.sentence: The bright sun ruled the day as the festival began in full swing.
examples.translation: The bright sun was the dominant presence during the day as the festival began.

examples.sentence: As dawn breaks, the sun will rule the day until the evening sets in.
examples.translation: As dawn breaks, the sun will govern the day until evening.

examples.sentence: In the 90s, grunge music ruled the day and influenced countless bands.
examples.translation: In the 90s, grunge music predominated and influenced countless bands.

examples.sentence: During the meeting, the CEO’s opinion ruled the day despite some objections.
examples.translation: During the meeting, the CEO’s opinion was the most influential factor despite some objections.

examples.sentence: For years, fast food ruled the day in the local dining scene before healthier options emerged.
examples.translation: For years, fast food was the dominant choice in the local dining scene before healthier options emerged.

examples.sentence: The heated debate ruled the day, leaving little room for other topics.
examples.translation: The heated debate dominated the circumstances, leaving little room for other topics.

examples.sentence: Her charismatic presence ruled the day at the conference, capturing everyone’s attention.
examples.translation: Her charismatic presence dominated the atmosphere at the conference, capturing everyone’s attention.

examples.sentence: In discussions about the project, budget concerns ruled the day over creative ideas.
examples.translation: In discussions about the project, budget concerns dominated the conversation over creative ideas.

examples.sentence: In our household, Mom rules the roost and decides all the major plans.
examples.translation: In our household, Mom is the dominant person and makes all the major plans.

examples.sentence: Though he’s the oldest sibling, it’s Dad who rules the roost when it comes to family decisions.
examples.translation: Though he’s the oldest sibling, Dad is the one who exercises control over family decisions.

examples.sentence: At the office, the manager rules the roost and everyone follows her lead.
examples.translation: At the office, the manager is in charge and everyone follows her lead.

examples.sentence: Who rules the roost when the boss is away on vacation?
examples.translation: Who is in charge when the boss is away on vacation?

examples.sentence: After Dad retired, Grandma started to rule the roost and organize family gatherings.
examples.translation: After Dad retired, Grandma took charge and organized family gatherings.

examples.sentence: It’s clear that Sarah rules the roost in the student council; everyone listens to her.
examples.translation: It’s clear that Sarah is in charge in the student council; everyone listens to her.

examples.sentence: Even though he’s quiet, Mike rules the roost when it comes to decisions about the project.
examples.translation: Even though he’s quiet, Mike is the one who holds control over decisions about the project.

examples.sentence: Jessica really ruled the school last year as the most popular senior.
examples.translation: Jessica was socially dominant and the most popular student last year.

examples.sentence: Back in middle school, those sporty kids ruled the school and set all the trends.
examples.translation: In middle school, the sporty kids were socially dominant and influenced trends.

examples.sentence: He tried hard but never quite ruled the school the way his older brother did.
examples.translation: He tried hard but never became socially dominant like his older brother.

examples.sentence: The principal rules the school with a firm hand, ensuring everyone follows the rules.
examples.translation: The principal exercises authority over the formal operations of the school.

examples.sentence: During the meeting, it was clear who ruled the school’s policies on discipline.
examples.translation: During the meeting, it was clear who controlled the school’s policies on discipline.

examples.sentence: The board members rule the school’s budget decisions every semester.
examples.translation: The board members control the school’s budget decisions every semester.

examples.sentence: Though he’s new, the vice principal rules the school in the principal’s absence.
examples.translation: Though he’s new, the vice principal governs the school in the principal’s absence.

examples.sentence: Those popular kids really rule the school, deciding who gets invited to parties.
examples.translation: Those popular kids control social activities and hierarchies in the school.

examples.sentence: The football team ruled the school’s social scene for years, intimidating many students.
examples.translation: The football team dominated social activities and hierarchies in the school.

examples.sentence: She’s been ruling the school’s clubs and events since her freshman year.
examples.translation: She has been controlling social activities and leadership roles in the school since her freshman year.

examples.sentence: The politician’s opponents launched a rumor campaign to damage his reputation before the election.
examples.translation: The politician’s opponents launched a coordinated effort to spread false information to damage his reputation before the election.

examples.sentence: There was a rumor campaign in the company to undermine the new CEO’s authority.
examples.translation: There was a coordinated effort to spread unverified information to undermine the new CEO’s authority.

examples.sentence: The scandal was fueled by a rumor campaign that spread false accusations online.
examples.translation: The scandal was fueled by a purposeful effort to spread false accusations online.

examples.sentence: They suspected a rumor campaign was behind the sudden drop in the product’s sales.
examples.translation: They suspected a coordinated effort to spread damaging false information caused the product’s sales to drop.

examples.sentence: The rumor mill at the office churned out stories about layoffs that turned out to be false.
examples.translation: The informal gossip network at the office spread stories about layoffs that were false.

examples.sentence: Whenever there’s a change in management, the rumor mill starts working overtime.
examples.translation: Whenever there’s a change in management, gossip spreads rapidly within the organization.

examples.sentence: I heard through the rumor mill that the company is planning a big merger next year.
examples.translation: I heard through informal gossip that the company is planning a big merger next year.

examples.sentence: The detective’s persistence finally helped run the suspect to earth after months of hiding.
examples.translation: The detective’s persistence finally helped uncover the suspect after months of hiding.

examples.sentence: We managed to run the lost shipment to earth by tracking its GPS location.
examples.translation: We managed to locate the lost shipment after tracking its GPS location.

examples.sentence: The journalist ran the corruption scandal to earth with a series of in-depth interviews.
examples.translation: The journalist uncovered the corruption scandal through in-depth interviews.

examples.sentence: Losing the final game was bad enough, but having the referee’s poor call was salt in the wound.
examples.translation: Losing the final game was bad enough, but the referee’s poor call made it even worse.

examples.sentence: When she forgot my birthday, that was salt in the wound after a rough week at work.
examples.translation: When she forgot my birthday, it made an already difficult week feel even worse.

examples.sentence: Getting stuck in traffic was bad, but then my phone died—that was salt in the wound.
examples.translation: Getting stuck in traffic was bad, but then my phone dying made the situation worse.

examples.sentence: The cancellation of the concert was disappointing, but the refund delay was salt in the wound.
examples.translation: The concert cancellation was disappointing, and the refund delay made it worse.

examples.sentence: I have a salty tooth and always prefer chips over chocolate.
examples.translation: I prefer savory snacks like chips rather than sweet ones like chocolate.

examples.sentence: Because of his salty tooth, he often chooses pretzels when snacking.
examples.translation: Because he prefers savory tastes, he often chooses pretzels when snacking.

examples.sentence: She doesn’t crave desserts much; she definitely has a salty tooth.
examples.translation: She doesn’t crave sweets much; she prefers savory foods.

examples.sentence: "Whether you call it garbage or rubbish, it’s the same difference," Mike said dismissively.
examples.translation: "Whether you call it garbage or rubbish, it doesn’t really matter," Mike said dismissively.

examples.sentence: She argued about the color choice, but honestly, it’s the same difference in the end.
examples.translation: She argued about the color, but in truth, it doesn’t matter.

examples.sentence: Is it a sedan or a hatchback? Same difference, as long as it runs well.
examples.translation: Is it a sedan or a hatchback? It doesn’t matter as long as it runs well.

examples.sentence: He forgot his anniversary again—same old story every year.
examples.translation: He forgot his anniversary again; this is a recurring problem every year.

examples.sentence: The meeting ran late, and the boss was irritated—same old story in this company.
examples.translation: The meeting ran late and the boss got annoyed; this happens regularly in the company.

examples.sentence: When the internet goes down during exams, it’s the same old story of chaos and complaints.
examples.translation: When the internet fails during exams, there is the usual chaos and complaints.

examples.sentence: During the holiday season, the factory floor looked like Santa's workshop, with everyone rushing to package gifts before the deadline.
examples.translation: Durante la temporada navideña, la planta de la fábrica parecía el taller de Santa, con todos apresurándose para empaquetar los regalos antes de la fecha límite.

examples.sentence: Whenever the team is under pressure to meet orders, the office turns into Santa's workshop, buzzing with activity and creativity.
examples.translation: Cada vez que el equipo está bajo presión para cumplir con los pedidos, la oficina se convierte en el taller de Santa, llena de actividad y creatividad.

examples.sentence: I could tell the new startup was like Santa's workshop, constantly churning out new gadgets and ideas every week.
examples.translation: Podía decir que la nueva startup era como el taller de Santa, produciendo constantemente nuevos gadgets e ideas cada semana.

examples.sentence: He was about to get caught in the lie, but luckily he was saved by the bell when the phone rang and interrupted the conversation.
examples.translation: Estaba a punto de ser atrapado en la mentira, pero por suerte lo salvó la campana cuando sonó el teléfono e interrumpió la conversación.

examples.sentence: If you had just waited a minute longer, you would have been saved by the bell when the meeting ended before they could reprimand you.
examples.translation: Si hubieras esperado solo un minuto más, te habría salvado la campana cuando la reunión terminó antes de que pudieran reprenderte.

examples.sentence: They were losing badly, but the final whistle saved them by the bell, giving them a chance to regroup for the next game.
examples.translation: Estaban perdiendo por mucho, pero el silbato final los salvó justo a tiempo, dándoles la oportunidad de reagruparse para el próximo juego.

examples.sentence: After missing the deadline, Jenna apologized and offered to work overtime to save face with her manager.
examples.translation: Después de perder la fecha límite, Jenna se disculpó y se ofreció a trabajar horas extras para salvar la cara con su jefe.

examples.sentence: He tried to save face by blaming the technical glitch instead of admitting he forgot the report completely.
examples.translation: Intentó salvar la cara culpando a un fallo técnico en lugar de admitir que olvidó completamente el informe.

examples.sentence: Even though the product launch failed, the team organized a charity event to save face and maintain public goodwill.
examples.translation: Aunque el lanzamiento del producto fracasó, el equipo organizó un evento benéfico para salvar la cara y mantener la buena voluntad pública.

examples.sentence: When Laura tripped on stage, her friend quickly helped her up to save her face in front of the audience.
examples.translation: Cuando Laura tropezó en el escenario, su amiga la ayudó rápidamente a levantarse para salvarle la cara frente al público.

examples.sentence: I didn't want to embarrass him during the meeting, so I changed the topic to save his face.
examples.translation: No quería avergonzarlo durante la reunión, así que cambié el tema para salvarle la cara.

examples.sentence: If you apologize sincerely, it might help save your boss's face after the project's failure.
examples.translation: Si te disculpas sinceramente, podría ayudar a salvar la cara de tu jefe después del fracaso del proyecto.

examples.sentence: The teacher saved the student's face by not mentioning his mistake in front of the whole class.
examples.translation: El profesor salvó la cara del estudiante al no mencionar su error frente a toda la clase.

examples.sentence: During the press conference, the spokesperson carefully worded the statement to save the politician's face after the scandal.
examples.translation: Durante la conferencia de prensa, el portavoz redactó cuidadosamente la declaración para salvar la cara del político tras el escándalo.

examples.sentence: She saved her colleague's face by covering for him when he forgot the client's appointment.
examples.translation: Ella salvó la cara de su colega cubriéndolo cuando él olvidó la cita con el cliente.

examples.sentence: They saved the company's face by issuing a prompt apology and correcting the faulty product quietly.
examples.translation: Salvó la cara de la empresa emitiendo una disculpa rápida y corrigiendo el producto defectuoso discretamente.

examples.sentence: On his first day at the factory, Tom was scared green, unsure of how to operate the complicated machinery.
examples.translation: En su primer día en la fábrica, Tom estaba aterrorizado por la inexperiencia, sin saber cómo manejar la maquinaria complicada.

examples.sentence: She looked scared green when asked to lead the team, having never managed a project before.
examples.translation: Ella parecía muy asustada cuando le pidieron liderar el equipo, ya que nunca había gestionado un proyecto antes.

examples.sentence: If you feel scared green about the interview, just remember everyone starts somewhere and gains confidence over time.
examples.translation: Si te sientes muy asustado por la entrevista, solo recuerda que todos empiezan en algún lugar y ganan confianza con el tiempo.

examples.sentence: When the thunderstorm hit unexpectedly, the campers were scared shitless and huddled together for safety.
examples.translation: Cuando la tormenta eléctrica llegó inesperadamente, los campistas estaban muertos de miedo y se acurrucaron juntos para estar seguros.

examples.sentence: I was scared shitless during the horror movie, jumping at every sudden noise.
examples.translation: Estaba muerto de miedo durante la película de terror, saltando con cada ruido repentino.

examples.sentence: She was scared shitless when she realized she had lost her passport right before the flight.
examples.translation: Ella estaba muerta de miedo cuando se dio cuenta de que había perdido su pasaporte justo antes del vuelo.

examples.sentence: During the concert, the fans screamed their heads off when their favorite band took the stage.
examples.translation: Durante el concierto, los fans gritaron con todas sus fuerzas cuando su banda favorita subió al escenario.

examples.sentence: The children screamed their heads off at the amusement park, especially on the thrilling roller coaster rides.
examples.translation: Los niños gritaron con todas sus fuerzas en el parque de atracciones, especialmente en las emocionantes montañas rusas.

examples.sentence: She screamed her head off after seeing the spider crawling on her bed, completely terrified.
examples.translation: Ella gritó con todas sus fuerzas tras ver la araña arrastrándose sobre su cama, completamente aterrorizada.

examples.sentence: The corner store is known to sell bargains on fresh produce every Saturday morning.
examples.translation: La tienda de la esquina es conocida por vender ofertas en productos frescos todos los sábados por la mañana.

examples.sentence: If you want to save money, shop at the flea market where vendors sell bargains on secondhand goods.
examples.translation: Si quieres ahorrar dinero, compra en el mercado de pulgas donde los vendedores venden gangas en artículos de segunda mano.

examples.sentence: During the holiday sales, the electronics shop sells bargains that attract huge crowds.
examples.translation: Durante las ventas navideñas, la tienda de electrónica vende ofertas que atraen a grandes multitudes.

examples.sentence: By quitting college for a low-paying job, he sold his birthright for a mess of pottage and regretted it later.
examples.translation: Al abandonar la universidad por un trabajo mal pagado, vendió su primogenitura por un plato de lentejas y luego se arrepintió.

examples.sentence: Don't sell your birthright for a mess of pottage by accepting shortcuts that compromise your long-term goals.
examples.translation: No vendas tu primogenitura por un plato de lentejas aceptando atajos que comprometen tus objetivos a largo plazo.

examples.sentence: She realized she had sold her birthright for a mess of pottage when she traded her creative freedom for a quick paycheck.
examples.translation: Ella se dio cuenta de que había vendido su primogenitura por un plato de lentejas cuando cambió su libertad creativa por un pago rápido.

examples.sentence: I wouldn’t sell my own grandmother just to get ahead at work; integrity matters more than money.
examples.translation: No vendería ni a mi propia abuela solo para avanzar en el trabajo; la integridad vale más que el dinero.

examples.sentence: When he agreed to that shady deal, people joked that he’d sell his own grandmother for a quick buck.
examples.translation: Cuando aceptó ese trato turbio, la gente bromeó diciendo que vendería a su propia abuela por dinero rápido.

examples.sentence: You might think he’d sell his own grandmother given how ruthlessly he pursues personal gain.
examples.translation: Podrías pensar que vendería a su propia abuela dado lo despiadadamente que persigue el beneficio personal.

examples.sentence: In many old legends, a desperate man sells his soul to the devil in exchange for wealth and power.
examples.translation: En muchas leyendas antiguas, un hombre desesperado vende su alma al diablo a cambio de riqueza y poder.

examples.sentence: The story tells of a musician who sold his soul to achieve unmatched talent but lost his happiness.
examples.translation: La historia cuenta de un músico que vendió su alma para lograr un talento inigualable pero perdió su felicidad.

examples.sentence: Some say the villain literally sold his soul to dark forces to gain supernatural abilities.
examples.translation: Algunos dicen que el villano literalmente vendió su alma a fuerzas oscuras para obtener habilidades sobrenaturales.

examples.sentence: He was rumored to have sold his soul in a secret pact, explaining his sudden rise to fame and fortune.
examples.translation: Se rumoreaba que había vendido su alma en un pacto secreto, lo que explicaba su repentino ascenso a la fama y la fortuna.

examples.sentence: Many fans accused the singer of being a sellout after he started endorsing products that clashed with his original message.
examples.translation: Muchos fans acusaron al cantante de ser un vendido después de que comenzó a promocionar productos que chocaban con su mensaje original.

examples.sentence: She faced criticism for her sellout when she abandoned activism to work for a large corporation.
examples.translation: Ella enfrentó críticas por su traición cuando abandonó el activismo para trabajar en una gran corporación.

examples.sentence: The politician’s sellout was clear when he voted against the party’s principles for personal gain.
examples.translation: La traición del político fue clara cuando votó en contra de los principios del partido por beneficio personal.

examples.sentence: The used car salesman tried to sell me a bill of goods by promising the vehicle was like new, but it broke down the next day.
examples.translation: El vendedor de autos usados intentó engañarme prometiendo que el vehículo estaba como nuevo, pero se descompuso al día siguiente.

examples.sentence: Don’t let anyone sell you a bill of goods about miracle weight loss pills—they’re usually scams.
examples.translation: No dejes que nadie te venda un cuento sobre pastillas milagrosas para bajar de peso; suelen ser estafas.

examples.sentence: She felt like she had been sold a bill of goods after investing in what turned out to be a fraudulent business scheme.
examples.translation: Ella sintió que le habían vendido un cuento después de invertir en lo que resultó ser un esquema comercial fraudulento.

examples.sentence: We need to send away the documents to the legal department for review by tomorrow.
examples.translation: Necesitamos enviar los documentos al departamento legal para revisión antes de mañana.

examples.sentence: Last week, the company sent away the defective products to the manufacturer for replacement.
examples.translation: La semana pasada, la empresa envió los productos defectuosos al fabricante para su reemplazo.

examples.sentence: I will send away the invitation cards once the guest list is finalized this afternoon.
examples.translation: Enviaré las tarjetas de invitación una vez que la lista de invitados esté finalizada esta tarde.

examples.sentence: The hospital sends away lab samples daily to an external lab for specialized testing.
examples.translation: El hospital envía muestras de laboratorio diariamente a un laboratorio externo para pruebas especializadas.

examples.sentence: After the argument, the manager sent away the disruptive employee to avoid further issues.
examples.translation: Después de la discusión, el gerente envió al empleado problemático para evitar más problemas.

examples.sentence: They sent away the guests who arrived too early, asking them to come back at the scheduled time.
examples.translation: Mandaron a los invitados que llegaron demasiado temprano, pidiéndoles que regresaran a la hora programada.

examples.sentence: The teacher sent away the students who were causing distractions during the exam.
examples.translation: El profesor expulsó a los estudiantes que causaban distracciones durante el examen.

examples.sentence: You might be sent away if you don’t have the proper credentials to enter the conference.
examples.translation: Podrías ser enviado fuera si no tienes las credenciales adecuadas para entrar a la conferencia.

examples.sentence: The doctor sent away the patient to a specialist for further evaluation of the symptoms.
examples.translation: El médico envió al paciente a un especialista para una evaluación más profunda de los síntomas.

examples.sentence: During the flu outbreak, some children were sent away to relatives to prevent spreading the virus at school.
examples.translation: Durante el brote de gripe, algunos niños fueron enviados a familiares para evitar propagar el virus en la escuela.

examples.sentence: Last month, the company sent away several employees to training centers to improve their skills.
examples.translation: El mes pasado, la empresa envió a varios empleados a centros de capacitación para mejorar sus habilidades.

examples.sentence: She was sent away to a rehabilitation clinic to receive treatment after her injury.
examples.translation: La enviaron a una clínica de rehabilitación para recibir tratamiento después de su lesión.

examples.sentence: I sent away for the new cookbook online and can't wait to try the recipes.
examples.translation: Pedí el nuevo libro de cocina por correo y no puedo esperar para probar las recetas.

examples.sentence: They will send away for replacement parts if the machine breaks down again.
examples.translation: Solicitarán piezas de repuesto si la máquina se descompone otra vez.

examples.sentence: Last year, we sent away for custom stationery through a catalog company.
examples.translation: El año pasado, pedimos papelería personalizada a través de una empresa de catálogos.

examples.sentence: If you want to get that rare stamp, you should send away for it before the offer ends.
examples.translation: Si quieres conseguir ese sello raro, deberías solicitarlo antes de que termine la oferta.

examples.sentence: She sent away for a vintage record and received it in the mail two weeks later.
examples.translation: Ella pidió un disco antiguo y lo recibió por correo dos semanas después.

examples.sentence: If you send away for the software now, you should get a discount on the purchase price.
examples.translation: Si pides el software ahora, deberías obtener un descuento en el precio de compra.

examples.sentence: They sent away for the promotional T-shirts to hand out at the event.
examples.translation: Solicitaron las camisetas promocionales para repartirlas en el evento.

examples.sentence: Before the game started, the referee asked the captains to send for a toss to decide who would kick off.
examples.translation: Antes de que comenzara el partido, el árbitro pidió a los capitanes que solicitaran un lanzamiento de moneda para decidir quién iniciaría.

examples.sentence: They always send for a toss when the score is tied to determine which team gets the ball first.
examples.translation: Siempre lanzan la moneda cuando el marcador está empatado para determinar qué equipo recibe primero el balón.

examples.sentence: If you can’t agree on who goes first, just send for a toss and let chance decide.
examples.translation: Si no pueden ponerse de acuerdo sobre quién va primero, simplemente pidan un lanzamiento de moneda y dejen que el azar decida.

examples.sentence: The coach sent for a toss before the match to fairly assign sides to the two teams.
examples.translation: El entrenador solicitó un lanzamiento de moneda antes del partido para asignar los lados de forma justa a los dos equipos.

examples.sentence: The eerie sound of footsteps in the empty hallway sent shivers down my spine last night.
examples.translation: El sonido escalofriante de pasos en el pasillo vacío me recorrió la espalda anoche.

examples.sentence: Reading that ghost story before bed always sends shivers down my spine.
examples.translation: Leer esa historia de fantasmas antes de dormir siempre me pone los pelos de punta.

examples.sentence: The sudden scream in the dark forest sent shivers down everyone's spine during the camping trip.
examples.translation: El grito repentino en el bosque oscuro puso los pelos de punta a todos durante el campamento.

examples.sentence: The orchestra’s performance was so powerful it sent shivers down the audience’s spine.
examples.translation: La actuación de la orquesta fue tan poderosa que estremeció a la audiencia.

examples.sentence: Watching the sunset over the mountains sent shivers down her spine with a mix of awe and happiness.
examples.translation: Ver la puesta de sol sobre las montañas le recorrió la espalda con una mezcla de asombro y felicidad.

examples.sentence: His speech about overcoming adversity sent shivers down the spines of everyone in the room.
examples.translation: Su discurso sobre superar la adversidad estremeció a todos en la sala.

examples.sentence: After his terrible presentation, the boss sent him packing without a second chance.
examples.translation: Después de su terrible presentación, el jefe lo despidió sin darle una segunda oportunidad.

examples.sentence: The unruly guest was sent packing when he refused to calm down at the party.
examples.translation: El invitado problemático fue expulsado cuando se negó a calmarse en la fiesta.

examples.sentence: If you keep breaking the rules, they might send you packing from the club.
examples.translation: Si sigues rompiendo las reglas, podrían expulsarte del club.

examples.sentence: The defending team sent the attackers packing after a strong counterattack in the final minutes.
examples.translation: El equipo defensor hizo retroceder a los atacantes tras un fuerte contraataque en los últimos minutos.

examples.sentence: We sent our competitors packing by securing the largest contract in the industry last quarter.
examples.translation: Hicimos que nuestros competidores se retiraran al asegurar el contrato más grande de la industria el último trimestre.

examples.sentence: The rebels were sent packing after the government forces regained control of the city.
examples.translation: Los rebeldes fueron expulsados tras las fuerzas gubernamentales recuperar el control de la ciudad.

examples.sentence: After his poor performance, the coach sent him to the showers early, disappointing the fans.
examples.translation: Tras su mala actuación, el entrenador lo mandó a la ducha temprano, decepcionando a los aficionados.

examples.sentence: She was sent to the showers after committing multiple fouls during the basketball game.
examples.translation: La enviaron a la ducha después de cometer múltiples faltas durante el partido de baloncesto.

examples.sentence: If you keep making mistakes on the field, you might be sent to the showers before the game ends.
examples.translation: Si sigues cometiendo errores en el campo, podrías ser sacado del juego antes de que termine.

examples.sentence: After the disagreement, the group decided to send him to Coventry and ignore his messages completely.
examples.translation: Después del desacuerdo, el grupo decidió aislarlo y no responder a sus mensajes en absoluto.

examples.sentence: She felt lonely because her coworkers sent her to Coventry following the office dispute.
examples.translation: Se sentía sola porque sus compañeros de trabajo la ignoraban tras la disputa en la oficina.

examples.sentence: When someone is sent to Coventry, it’s often a silent punishment where no one speaks to them.
examples.translation: Cuando alguien es aislado, suele ser un castigo silencioso donde nadie le habla.

examples.sentence: Historically, soldiers who disobeyed orders were sent to Coventry as a form of exile.
examples.translation: Históricamente, los soldados que desobedecían órdenes eran enviados al exilio como castigo.

examples.sentence: In the past, criminals were sometimes sent to Coventry to remove them from their communities.
examples.translation: En el pasado, a veces se enviaba a los criminales al exilio para alejarlos de sus comunidades.

examples.sentence: The old practice of sending someone to Coventry meant banishing them from social contact.
examples.translation: La antigua práctica de enviar a alguien al exilio significaba desterrarlos del contacto social.

examples.sentence: The manager sent the troublesome employee to dorse, effectively dismissing him from the project.
examples.translation: El gerente despidió al empleado problemático, enviándolo fuera del proyecto.

examples.sentence: After the argument, she was sent to dorse and told not to return until things cooled down.
examples.translation: Después de la discusión, la mandaron a salir y le dijeron que no regresara hasta que todo se calmara.

examples.sentence: They sent the contractor to dorse after repeated failures to meet deadlines.
examples.translation: Despidieron al contratista después de repetidos incumplimientos en las fechas de entrega.

examples.sentence: Please send this package to Dorse as soon as possible; he’s expecting it by Friday.
examples.translation: Por favor, envía este paquete a Dorse lo antes posible; él lo espera para el viernes.

examples.sentence: The letter was forwarded to Dorse after it arrived at the main office.
examples.translation: La carta fue reenviada a Dorse después de llegar a la oficina principal.

examples.sentence: Don’t forget to send the documents to Dorse for his signature before the deadline.
examples.translation: No olvides enviar los documentos a Dorse para su firma antes de la fecha límite.

examples.sentence: We sent the contract to Dorse yesterday, but he hasn’t responded yet.
examples.translation: Enviamos el contrato a Dorse ayer, pero aún no ha respondido.

examples.sentence: The message was sent to Dorse by courier to ensure it arrived quickly and safely.
examples.translation: El mensaje fue enviado a Dorse por mensajero para asegurar que llegara rápido y seguro.

examples.sentence: She sent the small parcel to Dorse with detailed instructions on how to handle it.
examples.translation: Ella envió el pequeño paquete a Dorse con instrucciones detalladas sobre cómo manejarlo.

examples.sentence: All correspondence was sent to Dorse’s office for processing last month.
examples.translation: Toda la correspondencia fue enviada a la oficina de Dorse para su procesamiento el mes pasado.

examples.sentence: Please send any urgent letters to Dorse immediately to avoid delays.
examples.translation: Por favor, envía cualquier carta urgente a Dorse inmediatamente para evitar retrasos.

examples.sentence: After years of loyal service, the old horse was finally sent to the glue factory because it could no longer walk properly.
examples.translation: Después de años de servicio leal, finalmente enviaron al viejo caballo a la fábrica de pegamento porque ya no podía caminar bien.

examples.sentence: They decided not to send the injured dog to the glue factory but instead chose to give it a peaceful retirement at home.
examples.translation: Decidieron no enviar al perro herido a la fábrica de pegamento, sino darle una jubilación tranquila en casa.

examples.sentence: When the veterinarian recommended sending the horse to the glue factory, Mark felt heartbroken but understood it was the humane choice.
examples.translation: Cuando el veterinario recomendó enviar al caballo a la fábrica de pegamento, Mark se sintió destrozado, pero entendió que era la opción humana.

examples.sentence: The old carriage horses were all sent to the glue factory after the company switched to motor vehicles.
examples.translation: Los viejos caballos de carruaje fueron enviados a la fábrica de pegamento después de que la empresa cambiara a vehículos motorizados.

examples.sentence: The manager told me that with the new software update, the old system would be sent to the glue factory.
examples.translation: El gerente me dijo que con la nueva actualización de software, el sistema antiguo sería descartado.

examples.sentence: When the team brought up that outdated policy, the CEO promptly sent the idea to the glue factory.
examples.translation: Cuando el equipo mencionó esa política obsoleta, el CEO descartó rápidamente la idea.

examples.sentence: I hope they don’t send me to the glue factory just because I’m getting older; I still have a lot to contribute.
examples.translation: Espero que no me descarten solo porque estoy envejeciendo; todavía tengo mucho que aportar.

examples.sentence: Please send word as soon as you arrive at the airport so we can pick you up on time.
examples.translation: Por favor, envía un mensaje tan pronto llegues al aeropuerto para que podamos recogerte a tiempo.

examples.sentence: She sent word yesterday that the meeting would be postponed due to unforeseen circumstances.
examples.translation: Ella envió un mensaje ayer diciendo que la reunión se pospondría debido a circunstancias imprevistas.

examples.sentence: If you don’t hear back, I will send word to the committee about the change in schedule.
examples.translation: Si no recibes respuesta, enviaré un mensaje al comité sobre el cambio en el horario.

examples.sentence: They had sent word ahead to ensure the guests were welcomed properly upon arrival.
examples.translation: Habían enviado un mensaje anticipado para asegurar que los invitados fueran bien recibidos a su llegada.

examples.sentence: The captain sent word to the troops that reinforcements would arrive by nightfall.
examples.translation: El capitán envió un mensaje a las tropas de que los refuerzos llegarían antes del anochecer.

examples.sentence: After the negotiations, the envoy sent word back to the government with the latest developments.
examples.translation: Después de las negociaciones, el enviado envió noticias al gobierno con los últimos acontecimientos.

examples.sentence: When you get there, send word to the team so they can prepare for your arrival.
examples.translation: Cuando llegues, envía un mensaje al equipo para que puedan prepararse para tu llegada.

examples.sentence: As a woodworker, she developed a keen sense of craft, noticing every detail in the grain and joinery.
examples.translation: Como trabajadora de la madera, desarrolló un agudo sentido del oficio, notando cada detalle en la veta y las uniones.

examples.sentence: His sense of craft is evident in the way he meticulously paints every stroke on the canvas.
examples.translation: Su sentido del oficio es evidente en la forma en que pinta meticulosamente cada pincelada en el lienzo.

examples.sentence: The apprenticeship helped him build a stronger sense of craft, improving both skill and patience.
examples.translation: El aprendizaje le ayudó a desarrollar un sentido más fuerte del oficio, mejorando tanto la habilidad como la paciencia.

examples.sentence: A true sense of craft requires not only talent but also dedication and attention to detail.
examples.translation: Un verdadero sentido del oficio requiere no solo talento sino también dedicación y atención al detalle.

examples.sentence: She showed a real sense of craft in negotiating the deal, knowing exactly when to push and when to concede.
examples.translation: Ella mostró un verdadero sentido de astucia al negociar el trato, sabiendo exactamente cuándo presionar y cuándo ceder.

examples.sentence: If you want to succeed in politics, you have to develop a sense of craft to navigate tricky situations.
examples.translation: Si quieres tener éxito en la política, debes desarrollar un sentido de astucia para navegar situaciones complicadas.

examples.sentence: His sense of craft was evident in how cleverly he avoided the pitfalls that trapped others.
examples.translation: Su sentido de astucia fue evidente en la forma ingeniosa en que evitó las trampas que atraparon a otros.

examples.sentence: A seasoned chef often has an instinctive sense of craft that guides every choice in the kitchen.
examples.translation: Un chef experimentado suele tener un sentido instintivo del oficio que guía cada elección en la cocina.

examples.sentence: Her sense of craft allowed her to produce garments that were both stylish and impeccably constructed.
examples.translation: Su sentido del oficio le permitió producir prendas que eran tanto elegantes como impecablemente confeccionadas.

examples.sentence: Developing a sense of craft takes years of practice and a willingness to learn from mistakes.
examples.translation: Desarrollar un sentido del oficio lleva años de práctica y la disposición a aprender de los errores.

examples.sentence: The teacher had to separate the wheat from the chaff when grading the essays to identify the best work.
examples.translation: El profesor tuvo que separar lo bueno de lo malo al calificar los ensayos para identificar el mejor trabajo.
