examples.translation: It’s too bad that the flight was delayed, but at least we arrived safely.

examples.sentence: Too bad the restaurant was closed when we arrived, but we found a great café nearby.
examples.translation: Too bad the restaurant was closed when we arrived, but we found a great café nearby.

examples.sentence: She said it was too bad the project didn’t get funded, showing real disappointment.
examples.translation: She said it was too bad the project didn’t get funded, showing real disappointment.

examples.sentence: Too bad about the lost opportunity, but there will be others in the future.
examples.translation: Too bad about the lost opportunity, but there will be others in the future.

examples.sentence: Ever since Jane got promoted, she's been acting like she's too big for her boots, bossing everyone around without listening.
examples.translation: Desde que Jane fue ascendida, ha estado actuando como si fuera demasiado importante, mandando a todos sin escuchar.

examples.sentence: You shouldn't be too big for your boots just because you aced that test; there's still a lot to learn.
examples.translation: No deberías creerte demasiado importante solo porque aprobaste ese examen; todavía hay mucho por aprender.

examples.sentence: He was told not to get too big for his boots, but after winning the award, he couldn't help boasting about it.
examples.translation: Le dijeron que no se creyera demasiado, pero después de ganar el premio, no pudo evitar presumir.

examples.sentence: Tom’s behavior was literally too big for his boots when he tried to lead the project without any experience.
examples.translation: El comportamiento de Tom fue literalmente demasiado para él cuando intentó liderar el proyecto sin experiencia.

examples.sentence: She looked too big for her boots in those oversized shoes, struggling to walk properly.
examples.translation: Ella parecía tener los zapatos demasiado grandes, luchando por caminar correctamente.

examples.sentence: The child’s new boots were too big for him, causing him to trip frequently during recess.
examples.translation: Las botas nuevas del niño eran demasiado grandes, lo que le hacía tropezar frecuentemente durante el recreo.

examples.sentence: After buying boots that were too big for his feet, Mark had to exchange them for a smaller size.
examples.translation: Después de comprar botas que le quedaban demasiado grandes, Mark tuvo que cambiarlas por una talla más pequeña.

examples.sentence: Don't get too big for your britches just because you won that small competition; stay humble.
examples.translation: No te creas demasiado solo porque ganaste esa pequeña competencia; mantente humilde.

examples.sentence: He was acting too big for his britches after getting a promotion, treating his colleagues disrespectfully.
examples.translation: Él actuaba con arrogancia después de recibir un ascenso, tratando a sus colegas con falta de respeto.

examples.sentence: If you become too big for your britches, people might quickly lose respect for you.
examples.translation: Si te vuelves arrogante, la gente podría perder el respeto por ti rápidamente.

examples.sentence: When she tried to take charge without permission, it was clear she was too big for her britches.
examples.translation: Cuando intentó tomar el mando sin permiso, estaba claro que estaba actuando con arrogancia.

examples.sentence: He’s acting too big for his britches, thinking he knows everything about the new system.
examples.translation: Está actuando con arrogancia, pensando que lo sabe todo sobre el nuevo sistema.

examples.sentence: They warned him not to get too big for his britches during the meeting, but he ignored the advice.
examples.translation: Le advirtieron que no se creyera demasiado durante la reunión, pero él ignoró el consejo.

examples.sentence: Being too big for your britches can alienate even your closest friends.
examples.translation: Actuar con arrogancia puede alejar incluso a tus amigos más cercanos.

examples.sentence: Mark was too clever by half when he tried to outsmart the system, only to get caught in the end.
examples.translation: Mark fue demasiado listo cuando intentó engañar al sistema, solo para ser atrapado al final.

examples.sentence: You’re being too clever by half if you think skipping the instructions will save time; it usually backfires.
examples.translation: Estás siendo demasiado astuto si crees que saltarte las instrucciones ahorrará tiempo; normalmente sale mal.

examples.sentence: She got too clever by half trying to manipulate the situation, which only made things worse.
examples.translation: Ella fue demasiado astuta intentando manipular la situación, lo que solo empeoró las cosas.

examples.sentence: His too clever by half remarks during the debate ended up undermining his own argument.
examples.translation: Sus comentarios demasiado inteligentes durante el debate terminaron por debilitar su propio argumento.

examples.sentence: Don’t be too clever by half with your answers; sometimes straightforwardness is better.
examples.translation: No seas demasiado astuto con tus respuestas; a veces la sinceridad es mejor.

examples.sentence: The comedian’s too clever by half jokes alienated part of the audience instead of amusing them.
examples.translation: Los chistes demasiado ingeniosos del comediante alienaron a parte del público en lugar de divertirlo.

examples.sentence: On Sunday afternoon, we just tool around the countryside in the convertible, enjoying the sunshine.
examples.translation: El domingo por la tarde simplemente paseamos por el campo en el descapotable, disfrutando del sol.

examples.sentence: Why don’t we tool around the city this evening and see where the night takes us?
examples.translation: ¿Por qué no damos una vuelta por la ciudad esta noche y vemos a dónde nos lleva?

examples.sentence: They were tooling around the lake in their boat, not really heading anywhere specific.
examples.translation: Estaban paseando por el lago en su bote, sin ir a ningún lugar específico.

examples.sentence: I spent the afternoon tooling around with the engine, trying to fix the strange noise it was making.
examples.translation: Pasé la tarde trasteando con el motor, tratando de arreglar el extraño ruido que hacía.

examples.sentence: She likes to tool around on her guitar, experimenting with different chords and melodies.
examples.translation: A ella le gusta tocar la guitarra de manera informal, experimentando con diferentes acordes y melodías.

examples.sentence: Before the presentation, I tooled around with the slides to improve their look.
examples.translation: Antes de la presentación, jugué un poco con las diapositivas para mejorar su aspecto.

examples.sentence: After finishing her work, she just tooled around the house, reading and listening to music all afternoon.
examples.translation: Después de terminar su trabajo, simplemente se relajó en casa, leyendo y escuchando música toda la tarde.

examples.sentence: I love to tool around on weekends, doing whatever feels relaxing without any pressure.
examples.translation: Me encanta pasar el tiempo los fines de semana haciendo lo que me relaja sin presiones.

examples.sentence: They tooled around the park, enjoying the fresh air and taking pictures of the scenery.
examples.translation: Pasearon tranquilamente por el parque, disfrutando del aire fresco y tomando fotos del paisaje.

examples.sentence: By the time we realized the mistake, it was too late to correct the report before submission.
examples.translation: Cuando nos dimos cuenta del error, ya era demasiado tarde para corregir el informe antes de enviarlo.

examples.sentence: She tried to apologize, but it was too late; the damage to their friendship had been done.
examples.translation: Intentó disculparse, pero ya era demasiado tarde; el daño a su amistad estaba hecho.

examples.sentence: If you don’t act quickly, it will be too late to save the deal.
examples.translation: Si no actúas rápido, será demasiado tarde para salvar el acuerdo.

examples.sentence: It’s too late to change the schedule now, so we’ll have to stick with the plan as is.
examples.translation: Ya es demasiado tarde para cambiar el horario, así que tendremos que seguir con el plan tal como está.

examples.sentence: They realized too late that ignoring the warning signs would lead to failure.
examples.translation: Se dieron cuenta demasiado tarde de que ignorar las señales de advertencia conduciría al fracaso.

examples.sentence: You can’t undo what’s been done; it’s too late to fix the situation.
examples.translation: No puedes deshacer lo que se ha hecho; es demasiado tarde para arreglar la situación.

examples.sentence: He arrived too late to catch the beginning of the movie, missing the crucial plot points.
examples.translation: Llegó demasiado tarde para ver el comienzo de la película, perdiéndose los puntos clave de la trama.

examples.sentence: The application was submitted too late, so it wasn’t considered for the scholarship.
examples.translation: La solicitud fue enviada demasiado tarde, por lo que no fue considerada para la beca.

examples.sentence: I wish I hadn’t been too late to join the team; they’re already fully staffed.
examples.translation: Ojalá no hubiera llegado demasiado tarde para unirme al equipo; ya están completos.

examples.sentence: A graphic designer’s tools of trade include software like Photoshop and Illustrator.
examples.translation: Las herramientas de trabajo de un diseñador gráfico incluyen software como Photoshop e Illustrator.

examples.sentence: For a carpenter, the saw and hammer are essential tools of the trade.
examples.translation: Para un carpintero, la sierra y el martillo son herramientas esenciales del oficio.

examples.sentence: Writers often consider their laptop and notebooks as their primary tools of trade.
examples.translation: Los escritores suelen considerar su portátil y sus cuadernos como sus principales herramientas de trabajo.

examples.sentence: With too many balls in the air, Sarah found herself missing deadlines and feeling overwhelmed.
examples.translation: Con demasiadas cosas en marcha, Sarah se encontró incumpliendo plazos y sintiéndose abrumada.

examples.sentence: I think you have too many balls in the air right now; maybe it’s time to delegate some tasks.
examples.translation: Creo que tienes demasiadas cosas en marcha ahora mismo; tal vez sea hora de delegar algunas tareas.

examples.sentence: Managing too many balls in the air often leads to mistakes and burnout.
examples.translation: Gestionar demasiadas cosas a la vez a menudo conduce a errores y agotamiento.

examples.sentence: He was juggling too many balls in the air, trying to handle work, school, and family commitments all at once.
examples.translation: Estaba manejando demasiadas responsabilidades a la vez, tratando de atender el trabajo, la escuela y la familia.

examples.sentence: Attempting to keep too many balls in the air can cause important details to be overlooked.
examples.translation: Intentar manejar demasiadas cosas al mismo tiempo puede hacer que se pasen por alto detalles importantes.

examples.sentence: Don’t put too many balls in the air if you want to maintain the quality of your work.
examples.translation: No manejes demasiadas cosas a la vez si quieres mantener la calidad de tu trabajo.

examples.sentence: After a long week, we danced to our heart’s content at the music festival.
examples.translation: Después de una larga semana, bailamos hasta saciarnos en el festival de música.

examples.sentence: You can eat to your heart’s content at the buffet; there’s plenty of food for everyone.
examples.translation: Puedes comer todo lo que quieras en el buffet; hay comida para todos.

examples.sentence: Let the kids play to their heart’s content in the park while you relax on the bench.
examples.translation: Deja que los niños jueguen todo lo que quieran en el parque mientras tú te relajas en el banco.

examples.sentence: She indulged in chocolate to her heart’s content after the stressful exam period.
examples.translation: Se dio un gusto con chocolate sin medida después del estresante periodo de exámenes.

examples.sentence: At the holiday party, everyone sang to their heart’s content late into the night.
examples.translation: En la fiesta navideña, todos cantaron sin parar hasta altas horas de la noche.

examples.sentence: Feel free to browse the library to your heart’s content; there are thousands of books to explore.
examples.translation: Siéntete libre de explorar la biblioteca todo lo que quieras; hay miles de libros para descubrir.

examples.sentence: Before the rain started, we quickly topped up the convertible to keep the interior dry.
examples.translation: Antes de que comenzara a llover, cerramos rápidamente el techo del descapotable para mantener el interior seco.

examples.sentence: He topped up the car’s soft top as soon as they reached the parking lot.
examples.translation: Él subió el techo del coche tan pronto como llegaron al aparcamiento.

examples.sentence: The mechanic showed me how to top up the folding roof on the vintage roadster.
examples.translation: El mecánico me mostró cómo subir el techo plegable del roadster antiguo.

examples.sentence: We’ll need to top up the convertible top before heading out; the weather looks unpredictable.
examples.translation: Tendremos que subir el techo del descapotable antes de salir; el clima parece impredecible.

examples.sentence: She topped up her water bottle before the hike to stay hydrated on the trail.
examples.translation: Ella rellenó su botella de agua antes de la caminata para mantenerse hidratada en el camino.

examples.sentence: The bartender topped up my glass with fresh wine without me even asking.
examples.translation: El camarero rellenó mi copa con vino fresco sin que yo lo pidiera.

examples.sentence: Don’t forget to top up the fuel tank before the long drive tomorrow.
examples.translation: No olvides llenar el tanque de combustible antes del largo viaje de mañana.

examples.sentence: He topped up the oil in the engine to the recommended level after the checkup.
examples.translation: Él rellenó el aceite del motor hasta el nivel recomendado después de la revisión.

examples.sentence: The driver topped up the hood of the vintage car to protect it from the sudden storm.
examples.translation: El conductor subió la capota del coche antiguo para protegerlo de la tormenta repentina.

examples.sentence: We topped up the canvas covering on the truck before starting the journey to secure the cargo.
examples.translation: Subimos la lona del camión antes de comenzar el viaje para asegurar la carga.

examples.sentence: During the parade, the convertible was topped up to shield the passengers from the sun.
examples.translation: Durante el desfile, se subió el techo del descapotable para proteger a los pasajeros del sol.

examples.sentence: He learned how to top up the retractable roof smoothly without causing any damage.
examples.translation: Aprendió a subir el techo retráctil suavemente sin causar ningún daño.

examples.sentence: After hearing the unfair criticism, Jane was really torqued off and refused to speak for a while.
examples.translation: Después de escuchar la crítica injusta, Jane estaba realmente molesta y se negó a hablar por un tiempo.

examples.sentence: Don't get torqued off over minor mistakes; it’s not worth losing your temper.
examples.translation: No te enfades por errores menores; no vale la pena perder la calma.

examples.sentence: He was so torqued off by the delays that he demanded to speak with the manager immediately.
examples.translation: Estaba tan enfadado por los retrasos que exigió hablar con el gerente de inmediato.

examples.sentence: She was torqued off after waiting an hour for her order without any updates.
examples.translation: Ella estaba irritada después de esperar una hora por su pedido sin recibir noticias.

examples.sentence: They got torqued off when the concert was abruptly canceled at the last minute.
examples.translation: Se enfadaron cuando el concierto fue cancelado abruptamente en el último momento.

examples.sentence: I was torqued off by the rude service and decided never to return to that restaurant.
examples.translation: Me molestó el servicio grosero y decidí no volver a ese restaurante.

examples.sentence: Being torqued off is understandable given the constant technical problems during the event.
examples.translation: Estar molesto es comprensible dadas las constantes fallas técnicas durante el evento.

examples.sentence: The car’s torque off the line was impressive, accelerating smoothly from a complete stop.
examples.translation: El torque del auto desde parado fue impresionante, acelerando suavemente desde la detención completa.

examples.sentence: This electric vehicle delivers high torque off the line, making city driving effortless.
examples.translation: Este vehículo eléctrico ofrece un alto torque al arrancar, haciendo que conducir en la ciudad sea fácil.

examples.sentence: Race car drivers rely on maximum torque off the line to gain an early advantage in the race.
examples.translation: Los pilotos de carreras dependen del torque máximo al arrancar para obtener una ventaja temprana en la carrera.

examples.sentence: The mechanic explained how torque off the line affects the vehicle’s initial acceleration performance.
examples.translation: El mecánico explicó cómo el torque al arrancar afecta el rendimiento de aceleración inicial del vehículo.

examples.sentence: The new policy will save money, to say nothing of improving overall employee morale.
examples.translation: La nueva política ahorrará dinero, por no mencionar que mejorará la moral general de los empleados.

examples.sentence: She’s an expert in marketing, to say nothing of her skills in graphic design and social media.
examples.translation: Ella es experta en marketing, sin contar sus habilidades en diseño gráfico y redes sociales.

examples.sentence: The project was behind schedule, to say nothing of the budget overruns that caused extra problems.
examples.translation: El proyecto estaba retrasado, sin mencionar los sobrecostos que causaron problemas adicionales.

examples.sentence: The software has bugs, to say nothing of the frequent crashes that disrupt work.
examples.translation: El software tiene errores, sin contar las frecuentes fallas que interrumpen el trabajo.

examples.sentence: He was late to the meeting, to say nothing of forgetting the important documents he was supposed to bring.
examples.translation: Llegó tarde a la reunión, sin mencionar que olvidó los documentos importantes que debía traer.

examples.sentence: The restaurant was noisy, to say nothing of the poor service that left customers frustrated.
examples.translation: El restaurante estaba ruidoso, sin mencionar el mal servicio que frustró a los clientes.

examples.sentence: He can barely run a mile, to say nothing of completing a full marathon.
examples.translation: Apenas puede correr una milla, y mucho menos completar un maratón completo.

examples.sentence: She struggles with basic math, to say nothing of advanced calculus.
examples.translation: Ella tiene dificultades con las matemáticas básicas, y mucho menos con el cálculo avanzado.

examples.sentence: We don’t have time to finish the report today, to say nothing of starting a new project.
examples.translation: No tenemos tiempo para terminar el informe hoy, y mucho menos para comenzar un nuevo proyecto.

examples.sentence: The city offers excellent public transport, to say nothing of affordable housing options.
examples.translation: La ciudad ofrece un excelente transporte público, por no mencionar opciones de vivienda asequibles.

examples.sentence: This laptop has a fast processor, to say nothing of its long-lasting battery life.
examples.translation: Este portátil tiene un procesador rápido, sin contar su batería de larga duración.

examples.sentence: Our team won the championship, to say nothing of breaking several records along the way.
examples.translation: Nuestro equipo ganó el campeonato, sin mencionar que rompió varios récords en el camino.

examples.sentence: He’s a talented musician, to say nothing of being a skilled songwriter and producer.
examples.translation: Es un músico talentoso, por no mencionar que es un hábil compositor y productor.

examples.sentence: The concert was amazing, to say the least; the crowd couldn’t stop cheering.
examples.translation: El concierto fue increíble, por decir lo menos; el público no dejaba de aplaudir.

examples.sentence: She was nervous before the presentation, to say the least, but she did a fantastic job.
examples.translation: Estaba nerviosa antes de la presentación, por decir lo menos, pero hizo un trabajo fantástico.

examples.sentence: The weather was challenging, to say the least, but the hikers managed to reach the summit.
examples.translation: El clima fue difícil, por decir lo menos, pero los excursionistas lograron llegar a la cima.

examples.sentence: The situation is serious, to say the least, and requires immediate attention.
examples.translation: La situación es grave, por decir lo menos, y requiere atención inmediata.

examples.sentence: His reaction was unexpected, to say the least, given how calm he usually is.
examples.translation: Su reacción fue inesperada, por decir lo menos, dado lo tranquilo que suele ser.

examples.sentence: The damage to the car was extensive, to say the least, making repairs very costly.
examples.translation: El daño al coche fue extenso, por decir lo menos, lo que hace que las reparaciones sean muy caras.

examples.sentence: Jessica's attention to detail in her project was meticulous to the nth degree, leaving no stone unturned.
examples.translation: Jessica prestou atenção aos detalhes em seu projeto até o mais alto grau, sem deixar nada passar.

examples.sentence: If you push your work ethic to the nth degree, you might risk burnout, so be careful.
examples.translation: Se você levar seu empenho ao extremo, pode correr risco de esgotamento, então tenha cuidado.

examples.sentence: The chef seasoned the dish to the nth degree, making sure every bite was bursting with flavor.
examples.translation: O chef temperou o prato ao máximo, garantindo que cada mordida estivesse cheia de sabor.

examples.sentence: In the equation, x raised to the nth degree means x multiplied by itself n times.
examples.translation: Na equação, x elevado à enésima potência significa x multiplicado por ele mesmo n vezes.

examples.sentence: The function f(x) equals x to the nth degree, where n is a positive integer.
examples.translation: A função f(x) é igual a x elevado à enésima potência, onde n é um inteiro positivo.

examples.sentence: When calculating powers, you raise the base number to the nth degree as indicated by the exponent.
examples.translation: Ao calcular potências, você eleva o número base à enésima potência conforme indicado pelo expoente.

examples.sentence: The polynomial includes terms of x to the nth degree, which represent the highest order in the expression.
examples.translation: O polinômio inclui termos de x elevado à enésima potência, que representam a ordem mais alta na expressão.

examples.sentence: During the meeting, Sarah was always to the point, never wasting time on irrelevant details.
examples.translation: Durante a reunião, Sarah sempre foi direta, nunca perdendo tempo com detalhes irrelevantes.

examples.sentence: Can you please keep your feedback to the point? We have very little time left.
examples.translation: Você pode, por favor, manter seu feedback direto? Temos pouco tempo restante.

examples.sentence: I appreciate how Mark's emails are to the point; they make communication so much easier.
examples.translation: Eu aprecio como os e-mails do Mark são diretos; eles tornam a comunicação muito mais fácil.

examples.sentence: Her remarks were very to the point, addressing exactly the issue we needed to discuss.
examples.translation: As observações dela foram muito pertinentes, abordando exatamente o problema que precisávamos discutir.

examples.sentence: Tom's comment about the budget was perfectly to the point, considering the financial constraints.
examples.translation: O comentário do Tom sobre o orçamento foi perfeitamente pertinente, levando em conta as restrições financeiras.

examples.sentence: If your question is to the point, I can provide a clearer answer without confusion.
examples.translation: Se sua pergunta for pertinente, posso fornecer uma resposta mais clara sem confusão.

examples.sentence: The report was concise and to the point, summarizing all key findings effectively.
examples.translation: O relatório foi conciso e direto, resumindo todos os principais resultados de forma eficaz.

examples.sentence: Please write your summary to the point so the readers can understand the core message quickly.
examples.translation: Por favor, escreva seu resumo de forma direta para que os leitores entendam rapidamente a mensagem principal.

examples.sentence: His presentation was to the point, avoiding any unnecessary elaboration.
examples.translation: A apresentação dele foi direta, evitando qualquer elaboração desnecessária.

examples.sentence: We need to keep our answers to the point during the interview to make the best impression.
examples.translation: Precisamos manter nossas respostas diretas durante a entrevista para causar a melhor impressão.

examples.sentence: Emily followed the recipe to the T, ensuring the cake turned out perfectly moist and fluffy.
examples.translation: Emily seguiu a receita à risca, garantindo que o bolo ficasse perfeitamente úmido e fofo.

examples.sentence: If you want the project done to the T, you must double-check every detail without fail.
examples.translation: Se você quer o projeto feito exatamente, deve checar cada detalhe sem falhas.

examples.sentence: The tailor crafted the suit to the T, matching every measurement with precision.
examples.translation: O alfaiate confeccionou o terno exatamente, correspondendo a cada medida com precisão.

examples.sentence: The train arrived to the T station right on schedule, impressing the commuters.
examples.translation: O trem chegou à estação T exatamente no horário, impressionando os passageiros.

examples.sentence: We need to deliver the documents to the T office by noon for processing.
examples.translation: Precisamos entregar os documentos no escritório T até o meio-dia para processamento.

examples.sentence: She directed the shipment to the T warehouse, as indicated on the manifest.
examples.translation: Ela direcionou a carga para o depósito T, conforme indicado no manifesto.

examples.sentence: The meeting will be held at the conference room next to the T building entrance.
examples.translation: A reunião será realizada na sala de conferências ao lado da entrada do prédio T.

examples.sentence: The architect’s blueprint matched the client’s vision to the tee, impressing everyone involved.
examples.translation: A planta do arquiteto correspondeu exatamente à visão do cliente, impressionando todos os envolvidos.

examples.sentence: You followed the instructions to the tee, so the model should assemble without any issues.
examples.translation: Você seguiu as instruções à risca, então o modelo deve ser montado sem problemas.

examples.sentence: Her outfit was chosen to the tee for the themed party, impressing the hosts with her accuracy.
examples.translation: A roupa dela foi escolhida perfeitamente para a festa temática, impressionando os anfitriões com sua precisão.

examples.sentence: He teed off from the tee with perfect form, sending the ball soaring down the fairway.
examples.translation: Ele deu a tacada do tee com forma perfeita, enviando a bola voando pelo fairway.

examples.sentence: The golf instructor demonstrated the correct stance right at the tee before the lesson began.
examples.translation: O instrutor de golfe demonstrou a postura correta bem no tee antes da aula começar.

examples.sentence: Players gathered around the tee as the tournament's first hole was announced.
examples.translation: Os jogadores se reuniram ao redor do tee enquanto o primeiro buraco do torneio era anunciado.

examples.sentence: The ball landed just past the tee, setting up a challenging second shot.
examples.translation: A bola pousou logo após o tee, preparando um segundo golpe desafiador.

examples.sentence: After a long day, Paul was exhausted to the tonsils and ready for bed.
examples.translation: Depois de um longo dia, Paul estava exausto até os ossos e pronto para dormir.

examples.sentence: She loves chocolate to the tonsils; no dessert is safe around her.
examples.translation: Ela adora chocolate intensamente; nenhuma sobremesa está segura perto dela.

examples.sentence: The crowd was thrilled to the tonsils when the band started playing their hit song.
examples.translation: A multidão ficou empolgada ao máximo quando a banda começou a tocar seu sucesso.

examples.sentence: The infection spread to the tonsils, causing severe swelling and discomfort.
examples.translation: A infecção se espalhou até as amígdalas, causando inchaço e desconforto severos.

examples.sentence: During the examination, the doctor noted inflammation extending to the tonsils on both sides.
examples.translation: Durante o exame, o médico observou inflamação que se estendia até as amígdalas de ambos os lados.

examples.sentence: The biopsy revealed lesions reaching to the tonsils, necessitating further treatment.
examples.translation: A biópsia revelou lesões que atingiam as amígdalas, exigindo tratamento adicional.

examples.sentence: Symptoms included sore throat and redness to the tonsils, indicating possible tonsillitis.
examples.translation: Os sintomas incluíam dor de garganta e vermelhidão nas amígdalas, indicando possível amigdalite.

examples.sentence: The feast featured a totus porcus, roasted whole and served with various sides.
examples.translation: O banquete contou com um porco inteiro assado e servido com diversos acompanhamentos.

examples.sentence: They prepared the totus porcus carefully, ensuring every part was cooked to perfection.
examples.translation: Eles prepararam o porco inteiro com cuidado, garantindo que cada parte fosse cozida à perfeição.

examples.sentence: At the festival, the totus porcus was the main attraction, drawing crowds eager to taste it.
examples.translation: No festival, o porco inteiro foi a atração principal, atraindo multidões ansiosas para experimentá-lo.

examples.sentence: The chef explained the traditional recipe for totus porcus, emphasizing the importance of seasoning.
examples.translation: O chef explicou a receita tradicional do porco inteiro, enfatizando a importância do tempero.

examples.sentence: When John ate all the snacks without sharing, we jokingly called him a totus porcus at the party.
examples.translation: Quando John comeu todos os lanches sem compartilhar, brincamos chamando-o de 'totus porcus' na festa.

examples.sentence: Her messy desk and constant snacking made her the totus porcus of the office.
examples.translation: Sua mesa bagunçada e o lanche constante a tornavam a 'totus porcus' do escritório.

examples.sentence: Don't be such a totus porcus during dinner; leave some food for the others.
examples.translation: Não seja tão porquinho durante o jantar; deixe um pouco de comida para os outros.

examples.sentence: When I mentioned her missed deadline, I could tell I touched a nerve because she got defensive immediately.
examples.translation: Quando mencionei o prazo perdido dela, percebi que toquei num ponto sensível porque ela ficou na defensiva imediatamente.

examples.sentence: You really touched a nerve by bringing up that old argument during the meeting.
examples.translation: Você realmente mexeu em um ponto sensível ao trazer à tona aquela discussão antiga durante a reunião.

examples.sentence: He didn’t mean to touch a nerve, but his comment about her work ethic clearly upset her.
examples.translation: Ele não quis provocar, mas seu comentário sobre a ética de trabalho dela claramente a chateou.

examples.sentence: The surgeon had to be very careful not to touch a nerve during the operation to avoid complications.
examples.translation: O cirurgião teve que ter muito cuidado para não tocar um nervo durante a operação para evitar complicações.

examples.sentence: If the needle touches a nerve, the patient will experience sharp pain immediately.
examples.translation: Se a agulha tocar um nervo, o paciente sentirá uma dor aguda imediatamente.

examples.sentence: The therapist explained how certain massage techniques might accidentally touch a nerve and cause discomfort.
examples.translation: O terapeuta explicou como certas técnicas de massagem podem tocar um nervo acidentalmente e causar desconforto.

examples.sentence: During the procedure, it was noted that the instrument touched a nerve, which required immediate adjustment.
examples.translation: Durante o procedimento, foi observado que o instrumento tocou um nervo, o que exigiu ajuste imediato.

examples.sentence: Let me touch base with you next week to review the project status.
examples.translation: Deixe-me entrar em contato com você na próxima semana para revisar o status do projeto.

examples.sentence: I touched base with the client yesterday to confirm their requirements.
examples.translation: Eu entrei em contato com o cliente ontem para confirmar suas exigências.

examples.sentence: Before we proceed, we should touch base to ensure everyone is aligned.
examples.translation: Antes de prosseguirmos, devemos entrar em contato para garantir que todos estejam alinhados.

examples.sentence: After years without speaking, I decided to touch base with my old college roommate.
examples.translation: Depois de anos sem falar, decidi entrar em contato com meu antigo colega de faculdade.

examples.sentence: The manager touched base with his team briefly to maintain good communication.
examples.translation: O gerente conversou brevemente com sua equipe para manter uma boa comunicação.

examples.sentence: We usually touch base once a month to keep our partnership strong.
examples.translation: Geralmente nos comunicamos uma vez por mês para manter nossa parceria forte.

examples.sentence: Can you touch base with me over the phone after the meeting to update me on the decisions?
examples.translation: Você pode falar comigo por telefone depois da reunião para me atualizar sobre as decisões?

examples.sentence: I touched base with Sarah via text to confirm the event time.
examples.translation: Eu falei com a Sarah por mensagem para confirmar o horário do evento.

examples.sentence: We’ll touch base briefly tomorrow morning to finalize the agenda.
examples.translation: Vamos nos falar brevemente amanhã de manhã para finalizar a agenda.

examples.sentence: Before the deadline, I need to touch base with the team to ensure all tasks are on track.
examples.translation: Antes do prazo, preciso entrar em contato com a equipe para garantir que todas as tarefas estejam no caminho certo.

examples.sentence: The coordinator touched base with the volunteers briefly to assign their roles.
examples.translation: O coordenador entrou em contato rapidamente com os voluntários para atribuir seus papéis.

examples.sentence: We will touch base after the conference to discuss potential collaborations.
examples.translation: Vamos nos comunicar após a conferência para discutir possíveis colaborações.

examples.sentence: She touched base with the client to update them on the progress of the project.
examples.translation: Ela entrou em contato com o cliente para atualizá-lo sobre o progresso do projeto.

examples.sentence: After a tiring day at work, I usually turn in around 10 pm to get enough rest.
examples.translation: Depois de um dia cansativo de trabalho, geralmente vou para a cama por volta das 22h para descansar o suficiente.

examples.sentence: She turned in early last night because she had an important meeting in the morning.
examples.translation: Ela foi dormir cedo ontem à noite porque tinha uma reunião importante de manhã.

examples.sentence: If you feel sleepy, it’s best to turn in and recharge for tomorrow’s activities.
examples.translation: Se você estiver com sono, é melhor ir para a cama e se recuperar para as atividades de amanhã.

examples.sentence: They are turning in now since the long road trip left them exhausted.
examples.translation: Eles estão indo dormir agora, pois a longa viagem de carro os deixou exaustos.

examples.sentence: If our company ignores these environmental regulations, the founder would turn in his grave.
examples.translation: Se nossa empresa ignorar essas regulamentações ambientais, o fundador se reviraria no túmulo.

examples.sentence: She said that if her late grandfather knew about the scandal, he would turn in his grave.
examples.translation: Ela disse que, se seu avô falecido soubesse do escândalo, ele se reviraria no túmulo.

examples.sentence: The historian claimed that the misuse of the national flag would make the first president turn in his grave.
examples.translation: O historiador afirmou que o uso indevido da bandeira nacional faria o primeiro presidente se revirar no túmulo.

examples.sentence: Over time, the shy boy turned into a confident speaker who inspired many.
examples.translation: Com o tempo, o menino tímido se transformou em um orador confiante que inspirou muitos.

examples.sentence: After years of practice, the amateur painter turned into a professional artist.
examples.translation: Depois de anos de prática, o pintor amador se tornou um artista profissional.

examples.sentence: She turned into a workaholic after starting her demanding new job.
examples.translation: Ela se tornou uma workaholic depois de começar seu novo emprego exigente.

examples.sentence: The quiet neighborhood turned into a bustling commercial area within a few years.
examples.translation: O bairro tranquilo se transformou em uma área comercial movimentada em poucos anos.

examples.sentence: If you stay out too late, you'll turn into a pumpkin and lose all your energy for the party.
examples.translation: Se você ficar fora até tarde, vai se transformar em uma abóbora e perder toda a energia para a festa.

examples.sentence: After the festival ended, the vibrant decorations turned into a pumpkin, dull and forgotten.
examples.translation: Depois que o festival acabou, as decorações vibrantes viraram uma abóbora, opacas e esquecidas.

examples.sentence: Don’t wait too long to take that opportunity, or it will turn into a pumpkin and disappear.
examples.translation: Não espere muito para aproveitar essa oportunidade, ou ela vai se transformar em uma abóbora e desaparecer.

examples.sentence: When faced with the angry crowd, the politician turned tail and left the venue quickly.
examples.translation: Quando confrontado com a multidão irritada, o político fugiu rapidamente do local.

examples.sentence: Seeing the fierce opponent, the boxer turned tail instead of fighting back.
examples.translation: Ao ver o adversário feroz, o boxeador fugiu em vez de revidar.

examples.sentence: They were ready to confront the issue until the criticism started, then they turned tail.
examples.translation: Eles estavam prontos para enfrentar o problema até que as críticas começaram; então, fugiram.

examples.sentence: After weeks of treatment, the patient finally turned the corner and showed real improvement.
examples.translation: Após semanas de tratamento, o paciente finalmente deu a volta por cima e apresentou uma melhora real.

examples.sentence: The company turned the corner last quarter, moving from losses to profitability.
examples.translation: A empresa deu a volta por cima no último trimestre, saindo das perdas para a lucratividade.

examples.sentence: Once the team fixed their communication issues, they turned the corner and started winning matches.
examples.translation: Depois que a equipe resolveu os problemas de comunicação, deram a volta por cima e começaram a ganhar partidas.

examples.sentence: At the dance party, Mike felt like he had two left feet and avoided joining the floor.
examples.translation: Na festa de dança, Mike se sentiu desajeitado e evitou entrar na pista.

examples.sentence: She joked that her two left feet made ballroom dancing a real challenge.
examples.translation: Ela brincou que seus dois pés esquerdos tornavam a dança de salão um verdadeiro desafio.

examples.sentence: I have two left feet when it comes to social events, so I usually stay quiet and watch.
examples.translation: Eu sou desajeitado em eventos sociais, então geralmente fico quieto e observo.

examples.sentence: The new store's decor is so full of pastel colors and glitter that some call it unicorn puke.
examples.translation: A decoração da nova loja é tão cheia de cores pastéis e glitter que alguns a chamam de 'vomito de unicórnio'.

examples.sentence: I can't wear that shirt; it looks like unicorn puke with all those bright patterns.
examples.translation: Eu não posso usar essa camisa; parece um vomito de unicórnio com todos aqueles padrões brilhantes.

examples.sentence: Her blog posts often feature unicorn puke aesthetics, which some readers find overwhelming.
examples.translation: As postagens do blog dela frequentemente apresentam estéticas de vomito de unicórnio, que alguns leitores acham excessivas.

examples.sentence: The designer's choice of neon pink and glittery fabrics was criticized as unicorn vomit by fashion critics.
examples.translation: A escolha do designer por rosa neon e tecidos brilhantes foi criticada como vomito de unicórnio pelos críticos de moda.

examples.sentence: That children's party theme is pure unicorn vomit—way too sugary and over the top.
examples.translation: O tema daquela festa infantil é puro vomito de unicórnio — doce demais e exagerado.

examples.sentence: I find the interior decoration a bit like unicorn vomit, too whimsical and flashy for my taste.
examples.translation: Acho a decoração do interior meio vomito de unicórnio, muito fantasiosa e chamativa para o meu gosto.

examples.sentence: After moving to a new country, Maria was unused to the local cuisine and found it challenging at first.
examples.translation: Depois de se mudar para um novo país, Maria não estava acostumada com a culinária local e achou difícil no início.

examples.sentence: I'm still unused to waking up early for my new job, so mornings are tough right now.
examples.translation: Ainda não estou acostumado a acordar cedo para meu novo emprego, então as manhãs estão difíceis agora.

examples.sentence: Children who are unused to cold weather often need extra layers to stay warm during winter.
examples.translation: Crianças não acostumadas ao tempo frio geralmente precisam de roupas extras para se manter aquecidas durante o inverno.

examples.sentence: He was unused to the fast pace of city life after living in a small town for years.
examples.translation: Ele não estava acostumado ao ritmo acelerado da vida na cidade depois de morar muitos anos numa pequena cidade.

examples.sentence: After retiring, he slowly became unused to the stress of his previous job.
examples.translation: Depois de se aposentar, ele gradualmente deixou de estar acostumado ao estresse do emprego anterior.

examples.sentence: The team became unused to playing without their star player after his unexpected departure.
examples.translation: A equipe deixou de estar acostumada a jogar sem seu jogador estrela após sua saída inesperada.

examples.sentence: Students may become unused to strict study schedules during long school breaks.
examples.translation: Os estudantes podem deixar de estar acostumados a horários rigorosos de estudo durante as longas férias escolares.

examples.sentence: She has become unused to eating out since cooking at home became her new routine.
examples.translation: Ela deixou de estar acostumada a comer fora desde que cozinhar em casa virou sua nova rotina.

examples.sentence: When the new policy was announced, many employees were up against the management, demanding changes.
examples.translation: Cuando se anunció la nueva política, muchos empleados se enfrentaron a la gerencia, exigiendo cambios.

examples.sentence: The students were up against the administration after the sudden cancellation of the festival.
examples.translation: Los estudiantes se rebelaron contra la administración tras la cancelación repentina del festival.

examples.sentence: If the community gets up against the proposed construction, the project might be delayed.
examples.translation: Si la comunidad se opone al proyecto de construcción, este podría retrasarse.

examples.sentence: Jessica found herself up against a tough deadline and had to work all night.
examples.translation: Jessica se encontró enfrentando un plazo difícil y tuvo que trabajar toda la noche.

examples.sentence: Are you up against any challenges with the new software rollout?
examples.translation: ¿Estás enfrentando algún desafío con la implementación del nuevo software?

examples.sentence: They are going to be up against some fierce competition at the upcoming tournament.
examples.translation: Van a enfrentarse a una competencia fuerte en el próximo torneo.

examples.sentence: The army was up against the enemy forces on the northern border.
examples.translation: El ejército estaba frente a las fuerzas enemigas en la frontera norte.

examples.sentence: During the storm, the fishermen's boats were up against the rocky shore, battered by the waves.
examples.translation: Durante la tormenta, los barcos de los pescadores estaban contra la costa rocosa, azotados por las olas.

examples.sentence: The climbers found themselves up against a steep cliff that blocked their path.
examples.translation: Los escaladores se encontraron frente a un acantilado empinado que bloqueaba su camino.

examples.sentence: The city is up against severe flooding after days of heavy rain.
examples.translation: La ciudad está enfrentando graves inundaciones después de días de fuertes lluvias.

examples.sentence: After losing his job and facing mounting bills, Tom knew he was really up against it.
examples.translation: Después de perder su trabajo y enfrentar facturas crecientes, Tom sabía que estaba en serias dificultades.

examples.sentence: We're up against it this quarter with budget cuts and fewer staff.
examples.translation: Estamos en apuros este trimestre con recortes presupuestarios y menos personal.

examples.sentence: She felt up against it when her car broke down miles from home on a cold night.
examples.translation: Se sintió en apuros cuando su coche se averió a kilómetros de casa en una noche fría.

examples.sentence: If the negotiations fail, the company will be really up against it financially.
examples.translation: Si las negociaciones fracasan, la empresa estará en serias dificultades financieras.

examples.sentence: We're really up against it trying to finish this project before the deadline.
examples.translation: Estamos realmente presionados intentando terminar este proyecto antes de la fecha límite.

examples.sentence: With only two hours left and half the work undone, the team was up against it.
examples.translation: Con solo dos horas restantes y la mitad del trabajo sin hacer, el equipo estaba contra el reloj.

examples.sentence: Are you up against it with all those meetings scheduled today?
examples.translation: ¿Estás presionado con todas esas reuniones programadas para hoy?

examples.sentence: After losing the map and running out of food, the hikers were really up a gum tree.
examples.translation: Después de perder el mapa y quedarse sin comida, los excursionistas estaban realmente atrapados.

examples.sentence: When the software crashed just before the presentation, I was definitely up a gum tree.
examples.translation: Cuando el software se cayó justo antes de la presentación, definitivamente estaba en un aprieto.

examples.sentence: If we don't find a way to fix this issue soon, we'll be up a gum tree with the client.
examples.translation: Si no encontramos una manera de solucionar este problema pronto, estaremos en problemas con el cliente.

examples.sentence: She realized she was up a gum tree when her car broke down in the middle of nowhere without a phone signal.
examples.translation: Se dio cuenta de que estaba atrapada cuando su coche se averió en medio de la nada sin señal de teléfono.

examples.sentence: The cottage is up a height overlooking the valley, offering stunning views.
examples.translation: La cabaña está situada en una altura con vistas al valle, ofreciendo vistas impresionantes.

examples.sentence: They built the watchtower up a height to keep an eye on approaching ships.
examples.translation: Construyeron la torre de vigilancia en una altura para vigilar los barcos que se acercaban.

examples.sentence: The village sits up a height above the river, safe from floods.
examples.translation: El pueblo está situado en una altura sobre el río, seguro de las inundaciones.

examples.sentence: We camped up a height to catch the sunrise over the mountains.
examples.translation: Acampamos en una altura para ver el amanecer sobre las montañas.

examples.sentence: After hearing the good news, she was really up a height, unable to sit still.
examples.translation: Después de escuchar las buenas noticias, ella estaba muy excitada, incapaz de quedarse quieta.

examples.sentence: Don't talk to him now; he's up a height about the upcoming exam results.
examples.translation: No le hables ahora; está nervioso por los resultados del examen próximo.

examples.sentence: The crowd was up a height with excitement as the band took the stage.
examples.translation: La multitud estaba muy animada cuando la banda salió al escenario.

examples.sentence: We had to up a height to reach the summit before sunset.
examples.translation: Tuvimos que subir a una altura para llegar a la cima antes del atardecer.

examples.sentence: They are uping a height carefully as the trail gets steeper.
examples.translation: Están ascendiendo una altura con cuidado ya que el sendero se vuelve más empinado.

examples.sentence: Tomorrow, we’ll up a height to get a better view of the valley below.
examples.translation: Mañana subiremos a una altura para obtener una mejor vista del valle abajo.

examples.sentence: She has been uping a height all morning as part of her training routine.
examples.translation: Ella ha estado subiendo una altura toda la mañana como parte de su rutina de entrenamiento.

examples.sentence: Come on, sleepyhead, up and at 'em! We've got a big day ahead.
examples.translation: ¡Vamos, dormilón, levántate y ponte en marcha! Tenemos un gran día por delante.

examples.sentence: The coach shouted, 'Up and at 'em, team!' just before the match started.
examples.translation: El entrenador gritó, '¡Arriba y a por todas, equipo!' justo antes de que empezara el partido.

examples.sentence: If you want to finish on time, you need to get up and at 'em early tomorrow.
examples.translation: Si quieres terminar a tiempo, tienes que levantarte y ponerte en marcha temprano mañana.

examples.sentence: After a slow start, the workers were finally up and at 'em by mid-morning.
examples.translation: Después de un comienzo lento, los trabajadores finalmente se pusieron en marcha a media mañana.

examples.sentence: The commander yelled, 'Up and at 'em!' to get the troops moving quickly.
examples.translation: El comandante gritó, '¡Arriba y a por todas!' para que las tropas se movieran rápido.

examples.sentence: When the alarm sounded, everyone was up and at 'em, ready to face the emergency.
examples.translation: Cuando sonó la alarma, todos se pusieron en marcha, listos para enfrentar la emergencia.

examples.sentence: If we want to catch the early train, it’s time to be up and at 'em.
examples.translation: Si queremos coger el tren temprano, es hora de levantarse y ponerse en marcha.

examples.sentence: As soon as the bell rang, the kids were up and away towards the playground.
examples.translation: Tan pronto sonó la campana, los niños salieron corriendo hacia el patio de juegos.

examples.sentence: We packed our bags quickly and were up and away before dawn.
examples.translation: Empacamos nuestras cosas rápidamente y nos fuimos antes del amanecer.

examples.sentence: The birds were up and away at first light, heading south for the winter.
examples.translation: Las aves se levantaron y se fueron con la primera luz, rumbo al sur para el invierno.

examples.sentence: ‘Up and away!’ shouted the pilot as the plane took off smoothly.
examples.translation: ¡Arriba y adelante! gritó el piloto mientras el avión despegaba suavemente.

examples.sentence: The children cheered ‘up and away’ as the balloon soared into the sky.
examples.translation: Los niños gritaron ‘¡arriba y adelante!’ mientras el globo ascendía al cielo.

examples.sentence: With a final wave, they said ‘up and away’ and started their road trip.
examples.translation: Con una última despedida, dijeron ‘¡arriba y adelante!’ y comenzaron su viaje por carretera.

examples.sentence: The kite was caught by the wind and went up and away over the trees.
examples.translation: La cometa fue atrapada por el viento y se elevó y alejó sobre los árboles.

examples.sentence: Smoke from the fire rose up and away into the clear blue sky.
examples.translation: El humo del incendio se elevó y alejó hacia el cielo azul despejado.

examples.sentence: The balloon slipped its tether and floated up and away, disappearing from sight.
examples.translation: El globo se soltó de su amarre y flotó hacia arriba y lejos, desapareciendo de la vista.

examples.sentence: Leaves were swirling up and away in the gusty autumn wind.
examples.translation: Las hojas giraban hacia arriba y lejos con el viento otoñal y fuerte.

examples.sentence: Maria is an up-and-comer in the tech industry, already leading several innovative projects.
examples.translation: María es una promesa en la industria tecnológica, ya liderando varios proyectos innovadores.

examples.sentence: The young artist is considered an up-and-comer and has exhibitions lined up for next year.
examples.translation: El joven artista es considerado un talento emergente y tiene exposiciones programadas para el próximo año.

examples.sentence: We’re excited to have an up-and-comer like James join our marketing team.
examples.translation: Estamos emocionados de tener a un talento emergente como James en nuestro equipo de marketing.

examples.sentence: As an up-and-comer in politics, she’s gaining support rapidly among younger voters.
examples.translation: Como una promesa en la política, está ganando apoyo rápidamente entre los votantes jóvenes.

examples.sentence: After her breakout role, she quickly became an up-and-comer in Hollywood.
examples.translation: Después de su papel destacado, rápidamente se convirtió en una estrella emergente en Hollywood.

examples.sentence: The company’s new CEO is an up-and-comer, known for innovative strategies.
examples.translation: El nuevo CEO de la empresa es un emergente, conocido por estrategias innovadoras.

examples.sentence: That young athlete is an up-and-comer to watch this season.
examples.translation: Ese joven atleta es una promesa a seguir esta temporada.

examples.sentence: The startup is an up and coming player in the renewable energy market.
examples.translation: La startup es un actor emergente en el mercado de energía renovable.

examples.sentence: She's an up and coming chef with several awards already under her belt.
examples.translation: Ella es una chef en ascenso con varios premios en su haber.

examples.sentence: This neighborhood is really up and coming, with new cafes and shops opening every month.
examples.translation: Este barrio está en auge, con nuevos cafés y tiendas abriendo cada mes.

examples.sentence: When the band cranked the volume up to eleven, the crowd went wild.
examples.translation: Cuando la banda subió el volumen al máximo, la multitud enloqueció.

examples.sentence: She turned her enthusiasm up to eleven during the presentation, inspiring everyone.
examples.translation: Ella llevó su entusiasmo al máximo durante la presentación, inspirando a todos.

examples.sentence: If you want to impress the judges, you’ll have to take your performance up to eleven.
examples.translation: Si quieres impresionar a los jueces, tendrás que llevar tu actuación al extremo.

examples.sentence: The dial on the device only goes up to eleven, not beyond.
examples.translation: El dial del dispositivo solo llega hasta el once, no más allá.

examples.sentence: Please set the scale up to eleven for this measurement.
examples.translation: Por favor, ajusta la escala hasta el once para esta medición.

examples.sentence: The counter stopped counting as soon as it reached up to eleven.
examples.translation: El contador dejó de contar tan pronto alcanzó el once.

examples.sentence: They only allow a maximum capacity of up to eleven people in the room.
examples.translation: Solo permiten una capacidad máxima de hasta once personas en la sala.

examples.sentence: I’m up to here with all these endless meetings; I need a break.
examples.translation: Estoy harto de tantas reuniones interminables; necesito un descanso.

examples.sentence: She told him she was up to here with his constant complaining.
examples.translation: Ella le dijo que estaba hasta aquí con sus quejas constantes.

examples.sentence: After dealing with the noisy neighbors for months, he was up to here with the situation.
examples.translation: Después de lidiar con los vecinos ruidosos durante meses, él estaba harto de la situación.

examples.sentence: The water in the bathtub reached up to here on my calf.
examples.translation: El agua en la bañera llegaba hasta aquí en mi pantorrilla.

examples.sentence: The paint on the wall was up to here, just below the window sill.
examples.translation: La pintura en la pared llegaba hasta aquí, justo debajo del alféizar de la ventana.

examples.sentence: Her scarf was wrapped up to here around her neck to keep out the cold.
examples.translation: Su bufanda estaba envuelta hasta aquí alrededor del cuello para protegerse del frío.

examples.sentence: The pile of books was stacked up to here on the desk, making it hard to work.
examples.translation: La pila de libros estaba apilada hasta aquí sobre el escritorio, dificultando el trabajo.

examples.sentence: We’re up to here with orders this season and can’t take any more.
examples.translation: Estamos saturados de pedidos esta temporada y no podemos aceptar más.

examples.sentence: She was up to here with paperwork after the audit.
examples.translation: Ella estaba abrumada de papeleo después de la auditoría.

examples.sentence: The team is up to here with problems in the project and needs support.
examples.translation: El equipo está saturado de problemas en el proyecto y necesita apoyo.

examples.sentence: I saw those kids sneaking around the alley; I think they’re up to no good.
examples.translation: Vi a esos chicos merodeando por el callejón; creo que están tramando algo malo.

examples.sentence: The manager suspects some employees are up to no good with the company funds.
examples.translation: El gerente sospecha que algunos empleados están haciendo algo indebido con los fondos de la empresa.

examples.sentence: Don’t trust him; he’s always up to no good when no one is watching.
examples.translation: No confíes en él; siempre está haciendo cosas malas cuando nadie lo ve.

examples.sentence: The children were up to no good, hiding each other’s toys and giggling.
examples.translation: Los niños estaban haciendo travesuras, escondiéndose los juguetes y riendo.

examples.sentence: I caught the cats up to no good again, knocking over the flowerpot.
examples.translation: Atrapé a los gatos haciendo travesuras otra vez, tumbando la maceta.

examples.sentence: They were up to no good, drawing on the walls with crayons.
examples.translation: Estaban haciendo travesuras, dibujando en las paredes con crayones.

examples.sentence: After the flood, the water was literally up to her ears as she waded through the street.
examples.translation: Después de la inundación, el agua le llegaba literalmente hasta los oídos mientras atravesaba la calle.

examples.sentence: The dog jumped into the lake and was submerged up to its ears.
examples.translation: El perro saltó al lago y quedó sumergido hasta los oídos.

examples.sentence: He was swimming so deep that the water was up to his ears at one point.
examples.translation: Estaba nadando tan profundo que en un momento el agua le llegó hasta los oídos.

examples.translation: The audience was in a state of stunned amazement after the magician’s trick.

examples.sentence: John’s unexpected promotion had me with my jaw in my lap; I never saw it coming.
examples.translation: John’s unexpected promotion left me in disbelief.

examples.sentence: After years away, she was welcomed back to her hometown with open arms.
examples.translation: After years away, she was gladly and warmly accepted by her hometown.

examples.sentence: The refugee family was received with open arms by the community center volunteers.
examples.translation: The refugee family was gladly accepted without reservation by the volunteers.

examples.sentence: When the lost dog returned, its owner greeted it with open arms.
examples.translation: The owner gladly and warmly welcomed the lost dog back.

examples.sentence: He lied about the mistake without batting an eye, showing no remorse at all.
examples.translation: He lied about the mistake without showing any concern or hesitation.

examples.sentence: The politician accepted the bribe without batting an eye, which shocked everyone.
examples.translation: The politician took the bribe callously, without any moral hesitation.

examples.sentence: She dismissed the criticism without batting an eye, clearly unaffected by it.
examples.translation: She ignored the criticism without showing any concern or reaction.

examples.sentence: When I told Sarah the shocking news, she reacted without batting an eye, staying completely calm.
examples.translation: Cuando le conté las noticias sorprendentes a Sarah, no parpadeó ni una vez, manteniéndose completamente tranquila.

examples.sentence: He accepted the sudden change in plans without batting an eye, as if it was expected all along.
examples.translation: Él aceptó el cambio repentino de planes sin pestañear, como si lo hubiera esperado desde el principio.

examples.sentence: Did you notice how the CEO responded without batting an eye to the criticism during the meeting?
examples.translation: ¿Notaste cómo el CEO respondió sin inmutarse a las críticas durante la reunión?

examples.sentence: My grandmother calls me every Sunday without fail to catch up on family news.
examples.translation: Mi abuela me llama todos los domingos sin falta para ponerse al día con las noticias familiares.

examples.sentence: Without fail, the mail arrives by noon every day, no matter the weather.
examples.translation: Sin falta, el correo llega antes del mediodía todos los días, sin importar el clima.

examples.sentence: If you want to improve, you have to practice your instrument without fail, even on busy days.
examples.translation: Si quieres mejorar, tienes que practicar tu instrumento sin falta, incluso en días ocupados.

examples.sentence: During the lecture, the professor pointed to the diagram and said, 'This is the word of finger that explains the process.'
examples.translation: Durante la conferencia, el profesor señaló el diagrama y dijo: 'Esta es la palabra del dedo que explica el proceso.'

examples.sentence: In the workshop, the instructor used the term 'word of finger' to highlight the importance of non-verbal communication.
examples.translation: En el taller, el instructor usó el término 'palabra del dedo' para destacar la importancia de la comunicación no verbal.

examples.sentence: Jessica wrote a note describing the sign language gestures as a kind of 'word of finger' language.
examples.translation: Jessica escribió una nota describiendo los gestos del lenguaje de señas como una especie de 'palabra del dedo'.

examples.sentence: The child's drawing showed a hand pointing upwards, which he called the 'word of finger' to represent direction.
examples.translation: El dibujo del niño mostraba una mano señalando hacia arriba, que él llamó la 'palabra del dedo' para representar la dirección.

examples.sentence: Some people mistakenly use 'word of finger' when they actually mean 'word of mouth' communication.
examples.translation: Algunas personas usan erróneamente 'palabra del dedo' cuando en realidad quieren decir comunicación 'de boca en boca'.

examples.sentence: The detective said he got the information through a 'word of finger,' indicating a secret gesture passed discreetly.
examples.translation: El detective dijo que obtuvo la información mediante una 'palabra del dedo', indicando un gesto secreto transmitido discretamente.

examples.sentence: In informal chats, 'word of finger' sometimes refers to messages sent through finger signals or tapping patterns.
examples.translation: En charlas informales, 'palabra del dedo' a veces se refiere a mensajes enviados mediante señales con los dedos o patrones de golpeteo.

examples.sentence: The word on the street is that the new café downtown is offering free coffee this weekend.
examples.translation: Se dice en la calle que la nueva cafetería del centro está ofreciendo café gratis este fin de semana.

examples.sentence: Have you heard the word on the street about the upcoming music festival? Everyone seems excited.
examples.translation: ¿Has escuchado lo que se comenta en la calle sobre el próximo festival de música? Todos parecen emocionados.

examples.sentence: The word on the street suggests that the company might be hiring more staff soon.
examples.translation: Se rumorea en la calle que la empresa podría contratar más personal pronto.

examples.sentence: The word on the wire this morning is that the peace talks have made significant progress.
examples.translation: La noticia que circula esta mañana por los cables es que las conversaciones de paz han avanzado significativamente.

examples.sentence: I checked the word on the wire for updates about the storm, and it looks like it will pass by tonight.
examples.translation: Revisé las noticias en la red para actualizaciones sobre la tormenta, y parece que pasará esta noche.

examples.sentence: According to the word on the wire, the stock market is expected to rebound after last week's losses.
examples.translation: Según las noticias que llegan por la red, se espera que el mercado bursátil se recupere después de las pérdidas de la semana pasada.

examples.sentence: No matter who she meets, Emily manages to wrap them around her little finger with her charm.
examples.translation: No importa a quién conozca, Emily logra envolverlos alrededor de su dedo meñique con su encanto.

examples.sentence: He had his clients wrapped around his little finger, convincing them to buy even the most expensive products.
examples.translation: Tenía a sus clientes completamente a su merced, convenciéndolos de comprar incluso los productos más caros.

examples.sentence: Do you really think you can wrap the boss around your little finger just by complimenting her?
examples.translation: ¿De verdad crees que puedes tener al jefe en la palma de tu mano solo con elogiarla?

examples.sentence: After his surgery, the doctors wrapped him in cotton wool, ensuring he avoided any strain during recovery.
examples.translation: Después de su cirugía, los médicos lo trataron con mucho cuidado para que evitara cualquier esfuerzo durante la recuperación.

examples.sentence: Parents sometimes wrap their children in cotton wool, but it can prevent them from learning to handle challenges.
examples.translation: Los padres a veces sobreprotegen a sus hijos, pero eso puede impedir que aprendan a enfrentar desafíos.

examples.sentence: She felt suffocated because her family wrapped her in cotton wool and never let her make decisions alone.
examples.translation: Ella se sentía asfixiada porque su familia la sobreprotegía y nunca la dejaba tomar decisiones sola.

examples.sentence: The politician tried to wrap the controversial policy in the flag to gain public support despite criticism.
examples.translation: El político intentó presentar la política controvertida como un acto patriótico para ganar apoyo público a pesar de las críticas.

examples.sentence: By wrapping the debate in the flag, the company discouraged any dissent about its environmental practices.
examples.translation: Al envolver el debate en la bandera, la empresa desalentó cualquier disenso sobre sus prácticas medioambientales.

examples.sentence: Isn’t it just a tactic when leaders wrap in the flag to avoid answering difficult questions honestly?
examples.translation: ¿No es solo una táctica cuando los líderes apelan al patriotismo para evitar responder preguntas difíciles con honestidad?

examples.sentence: Coach Davis spent the afternoon explaining the X's and O's of the new football strategy to the team.
examples.translation: El entrenador Davis pasó la tarde explicando las tácticas del nuevo plan de fútbol al equipo.

examples.sentence: The military briefing included detailed X's and O's to show troop movements in the upcoming operation.
examples.translation: El informe militar incluyó detallados esquemas para mostrar los movimientos de las tropas en la próxima operación.

examples.sentence: During the planning session, we mapped out all the X's and O's to ensure every step was covered.
examples.translation: Durante la sesión de planificación, trazamos todas las tácticas para asegurarnos de que cada paso estuviera cubierto.

examples.sentence: Understanding the X's and O's of the game is essential before you can effectively coach the players.
examples.translation: Comprender las tácticas del juego es esencial antes de poder entrenar efectivamente a los jugadores.

examples.sentence: She ended her letter with lots of X's and O's to show her affection to her best friend.
examples.translation: Ella terminó su carta con muchos besos y abrazos para mostrar su cariño a su mejor amiga.

examples.sentence: I always sign off my texts to my mom with X's and O's to remind her I love her.
examples.translation: Siempre termino mis mensajes a mi mamá con besos y abrazos para recordarle que la quiero.

examples.sentence: Did you notice that he added extra X's and O's in his message? He must really care about her.
examples.translation: ¿Notaste que agregó muchos besos y abrazos en su mensaje? Debe importarle mucho.

examples.sentence: In her birthday card, Maria wrote warm X's and O's to express her love and best wishes.
examples.translation: En la tarjeta de cumpleaños, María escribió cariñosos besos y abrazos para expresar su amor y mejores deseos.

examples.sentence: The couple's text exchange was full of X's and O's, highlighting their deep affection for each other.
examples.translation: El intercambio de mensajes de la pareja estaba lleno de besos y abrazos, resaltando su profundo cariño mutuo.

examples.sentence: After a long day, he sent his daughter a message with X's and O's to cheer her up.
examples.translation: Después de un largo día, le envió a su hija un mensaje con besos y abrazos para animarla.

examples.sentence: I found a shiny Yankee dime on the sidewalk while walking home yesterday.
examples.translation: Encontré una reluciente moneda de diez centavos estadounidense en la acera mientras caminaba a casa ayer.

examples.sentence: The museum displayed an old Yankee dime from the 1920s as part of its coin collection.
examples.translation: El museo exhibió una antigua moneda de diez centavos estadounidense de los años 20 como parte de su colección.

examples.sentence: She kept a Yankee dime in her wallet as a good luck charm during her travels.
examples.translation: Ella guardaba una moneda de diez centavos estadounidense en su cartera como amuleto de buena suerte durante sus viajes.

examples.sentence: When I was a kid, I collected Yankee dimes because they were small and shiny.
examples.translation: Cuando era niño, coleccionaba monedas de diez centavos estadounidenses porque eran pequeñas y brillantes.

examples.sentence: He didn’t give a Yankee dime to help with the charity fundraiser last year.
examples.translation: No dio ni un centavo para ayudar con la recaudación de fondos benéfica el año pasado.

examples.sentence: If you expect me to invest in your project, I won’t contribute a Yankee dime unless I see solid results.
examples.translation: Si esperas que invierta en tu proyecto, no pondré ni un centavo a menos que vea resultados sólidos.

examples.sentence: Despite all the promises, the company hasn’t put a Yankee dime into improving employee benefits.
examples.translation: A pesar de todas las promesas, la empresa no ha invertido ni un centavo en mejorar los beneficios para los empleados.

examples.sentence: Grandma has been baking bread the same way since the year dot, and it tastes amazing.
examples.translation: La abuela ha estado haciendo pan de la misma manera desde hace siglos, y sabe increíble.

examples.sentence: This town has been a fishing village since the year dot, with traditions passed down for generations.
examples.translation: Este pueblo ha sido una aldea pesquera desde tiempos inmemoriales, con tradiciones transmitidas por generaciones.

examples.sentence: The legend of the haunted castle has been told since the year dot, captivating visitors every season.
examples.translation: La leyenda del castillo encantado se ha contado desde siempre, cautivando a los visitantes cada temporada.
